(function() {
  function getCookieTheme() {
    var match = document.cookie.match(/(?:^|;\s*)expo-theme=([^;]*)/);
    var val = match && match[1];
    return val === 'dark' || val === 'light' ? val : null;
  }
  var theme = getCookieTheme();
  if (theme === 'dark' || (!theme && window.matchMedia('(prefers-color-scheme: dark)').matches)) {
    document.documentElement.classList.add('dark-theme');
  } else {
    document.documentElement.classList.remove('dark-theme');
  }
})();

class="mb-6 h-[0.05rem] border-0 bg-palette-gray6 max-md:hidden"/><p class="text-inherit font-normal text-base [&amp;_strong]:wrap-break-word mb-[1.5ch]" data-text="true"><code class="text-inherit text-xs leading-[130%] font-normal inline-block rounded-md border border-secondary bg-subtle px-1 py-0.5" data-text="true">expo-file-system</code> provides access to files and directories stored on a device or bundled as assets into the native project. It also allows downloading files from the network.</p>
<h2 class="text-inherit text-[25px] leading-[1.4] font-bold tracking-[-0.021rem] mt-8 mb-3.5 [&amp;_code]:text-[90%] max-md:text-[22px] max-md:leading-[1.409] max-sm:text-[19px] max-sm:leading-[1.5263] group flex gap-1 scroll-m-5" data-heading="true" id="installation">Installation<a href="#installation" class="border border-solid rounded-full font-medium items-center whitespace-nowrap gap-2 text-sm border-button-quaternary bg-button-quaternary text-button-quaternary shadow-none hocus:bg-button-quaternary-hover active:scale-98 relative my-auto inline-flex size-6.25 min-w-6.25 justify-center p-0 transition-all duration-default invisible opacity-0 group-hover:visible group-hover:opacity-100 group-focus-visible:visible group-focus-visible:opacity-100"><span class="flex self-center text-inherit leading-none select-none"><svg aria-label="permalink" class="icon-sm shrink-0" width="24" height="24" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><path d="M10 13a5 5 0 007.54.54l3-3a5 5 0 00-7.07-7.07l-1.72 1.71" stroke="#9B9B9B" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"></path><path d="M14 11a5 5 0 00-7.54-.54l-3 3a5 5 0 007.07 7.07l1.71-1.71" stroke="#9B9B9B" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"></path></svg></span></a></h2>

border-transparent bg-palette-black whitespace-nowrap flex flex-col"><div class="w-fit"><code class="text-inherit text-xs leading-[130%] font-normal inline-block rounded-md border border-secondary bg-subtle px-1 py-0.5 border-none! bg-transparent! whitespace-pre text-secondary! select-none" data-text="true" data-md="skip">- </code><code class="text-xs leading-[130%] font-normal inline-block rounded-md border border-secondary bg-subtle px-1 py-0.5 border-none! bg-transparent! whitespace-pre text-default" data-text="true"><span class="token function">npx</span> expo install expo-file-system</code></div></div></div><p class="text-inherit font-normal text-base [&amp;_strong]:wrap-break-word" data-text="true">If you are installing this in an <a class="cursor-pointer decoration-0 hocus:opacity-80 font-normal text-link visited:text-link hocus:underline [&amp;_code]:hocus:underline [&amp;_b]:text-link [&amp;_code]:text-link [&amp;_em]:text-link [&amp;_i]:text-link [&amp;_span]:text-link [&amp;_strong]:text-link" href="/bare/overview">existing React Native app</a>,<!-- --> <!-- -->make sure to<!-- --> <a class="cursor-pointer decoration-0 hocus:opacity-80 font-normal text-link visited:text-link hocus:underline [&amp;_code]:hocus:underline [&amp;_b]:text-link [&amp;_code]:text-link [&amp;_em]:text-link [&amp;_i]:text-link [&amp;_span]:text-link [&amp;_strong]:text-link" href="/bare/installing-expo-modules">install <code class="text-inherit text-xs leading-[130%] font-normal inline-block rounded-md border border-secondary bg-subtle px-1 py-0.5" data-text="true">expo</code></a> <!-- -->in your project.</p>
<h2 class="text-inherit text-[25px] leading-[1.4] font-bold tracking-[-0.021rem] mt-8 mb-3.5 [&amp;_code]:text-[90%] max-md:text-[22px] max-md:leading-[1.409] max-sm:text-[19px] max-sm:leading-[1.5263] group flex gap-1 scroll-m-5" data-heading="true" id="configuration-in-app-config">Configuration in app config<a href="#configuration-in-app-config" class="border border-solid rounded-full font-medium items-center whitespace-nowrap gap-2 text-sm border-button-quaternary bg-button-quaternary text-button-quaternary shadow-none hocus:bg-button-quaternary-hover active:scale-98 relative my-auto inline-flex size-6.25 min-w-6.25 justify-center p-0 transition-all duration-default invisible opacity-0 group-hover:visible group-hover:opacity-100 group-focus-visible:visible group-focus-visible:opacity-100"><span class="flex self-center text-inherit leading-none select-none"><svg aria-label="permalink" class="icon-sm shrink-0" width="24" height="24" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><path d="M10 13a5 5 0 007.54.54l3-3a5 5 0 00-7.07-7.07l-1.72 1.71" stroke="#9B9B9B" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"></path><path d="M14 11a5 5 0 00-7.54-.54l-3 3a5 5 0 007.07 7.07l1.71-1.71" stroke="#9B9B9B" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"></path></svg></span></a></h2>
<p class="text-inherit font-normal text-base [&amp;_strong]:wrap-break-word mb-[1.5ch]" data-text="true">You can configure <code class="text-inherit text-xs leading-[130%] font-normal inline-block rounded-md border border-secondary bg-subtle px-1 py-0.5" data-text="true">expo-file-system</code> using its built-in <a class="cursor-pointer decoration-0 hocus:opacity-80 font-normal text-link visited:text-link hocus:underline [&amp;_code]:hocus:underline [&amp;_b]:text-link [&amp;_code]:text-link [&amp;_em]:text-link [&amp;_i]:text-link [&amp;_span]:text-link [&amp;_strong]:text-link" href="/config-plugins/introduction">config plugin</a> if you use config plugins in your project (<a class="cursor-pointer decoration-0 hocus:opacity-80 font-normal text-link visited:text-link hocus:underline [&amp;_code]:hocus:underline [&amp;_b]:text-link [&amp;_code]:text-link [&amp;_em]:text-link [&amp;_i]:text-link [&amp;_span]:text-link [&amp;_strong]:text-link" href="/workflow/continuous-native-generation">Continuous Native Generation (CNG)</a>). The plugin allows you to configure various properties that cannot be set at runtime and require building a new app binary to take effect. If your app does <span class="leading-[1.6154] text-inherit font-semibold" data-text="true">not</span> use CNG, then you&#x27;ll need to manually configure the library.</p>
<h3 class="text-inherit text-[20px] leading-normal font-semibold tracking-[-0.017rem] mt-7 mb-3 [&amp;_code]:text-[90%] max-md:text-[18px] max-md:leading-[1.5555] max-sm:text-[16px] 1.45727V1.45728Z"></path></g></svg><span class="text-xs! leading-none! font-normal whitespace-nowrap">iOS</span></div><br/></span></div><p class="text-inherit font-normal text-[14px] leading-[1.5715] tracking-[-0.006rem] mb-2.5 [table_&amp;]:last:mb-0" data-text="true">A boolean to enable <code class="text-inherit text-xs leading-[130%] font-normal inline-block rounded-md border border-secondary bg-subtle px-1 inline! py-0 wrap-break-word" data-text="true">UIFileSharingEnabled</code> in <span class="leading-[1.6154] text-inherit font-semibold" data-text="true">Info.plist</span>. This enables file sharing in the iOS Files app, making the app&#x27;s Documents directory accessible to users through the Files app, iTunes File Sharing, and other file management tools.</p></td></tr></tbody></table></div>
<details id="are-you-using-this-library-in-an" class="mb-3 scroll-m-4 rounded-md border border-default bg-default p-0 [&amp;[open]]:shadow-xs [h4+&amp;]:mt-3 [li&gt;&amp;]:mt-3 [p+&amp;]:mt-3" data-md="collapsible"><summary class="group m-0 grid cursor-pointer grid-cols-[min-content_auto_min-content_1fr] items-center rounded-md bg-subtle p-1.5 pr-3 [details[open]&gt;&amp;]:rounded-b-none [&amp;_h4]:my-0 [&amp;_code]:mt-px [&amp;_code]:inline [&amp;_code]:bg-element [&amp;_code]:pb-px [&amp;_code]:text-[85%] [&amp;_code]:leading-snug"><div class="mt-1.25 mr-2 ml-1.5 self-baseline"><svg fill="none" viewBox="0 0 24 24" class="translate-z shrink-0 icon-sm text-icon-default -rotate-90 transition-transform duration-200 [details[open]&gt;summary_&amp;]:rotate-0" role="img" aria-hidden="true"><g id="triangle-down-custom-icon"><path id="Vector 250" fill="currentColor" d="M18.8831 9.43005H5.11694L12 16.3131L18.8831 9.43005Z"></path></g></svg></div><span class="leading-[1.6154] text-inherit font-medium relative mr-1 inline scroll-m-5 items-center gap-1.5 group-hover:text-secondary group-hover:[&amp;_code]:text-secondary" data-text="true">Are you using this library in an existing React Native app?</span><a href="#are-you-using-this-library-in-an" class="ml-auto inline rounded-md p-1 hocus:bg-element" aria-label="Permalink"><svg aria-label="permalink" class="invisible inline-flex icon-sm group-hover:visible group-focus-visible:visible" width="24" height="24" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><path d="M10 13a5 5 0 007.54.54l3-3a5 5 0 00-7.07-7.07l-1.72 1.71" stroke="#9B9B9B" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"></path><path d="M14 11a5 5 0 00-7.54-.54l-3 3a5 5 0 007.07 7.07l1.71-1.71" stroke="#9B9B9B" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"></path></svg></a><div></div></summary><div class="overflow-hidden" style="height:0px"><div class="px-5 py-4 [&amp;_p]:ml-0 [&amp;_pre&gt;pre]:mt-0 [&amp;&gt;*:last-child]:mb-1!"><p class="text-inherit font-normal text-base [&amp;_strong]:wrap-break-word mb-[1.5ch]" data-text="true">If you&#x27;re not using Continuous Native Generation (<a class="cursor-pointer decoration-0 hocus:opacity-80 font-normal text-link visited:text-link hocus:underline [&amp;_code]:hocus:underline [&amp;_b]:text-link [&amp;_code]:text-link [&amp;_em]:text-link [&amp;_i]:text-link [&amp;_span]:text-link [&amp;_strong]:text-link" href="/workflow/continuous-native-generation">CNG</a>) or you&#x27;re using native <span class="leading-[1.6154] text-inherit font-semibold" data-text="true">ios</span> project manually, then you need to add the <code class="text-inherit text-xs leading-[130%] font-normal inline-block rounded-md border border-secondary bg-subtle px-1 py-0.5" data-text="true">LSSupportsOpeningDocumentsInPlace</code> and <code class="text-inherit text-xs leading-[130%] font-normal inline-block rounded-md border border-secondary bg-subtle px-1 py-0.5" data-text="true">UIFileSharingEnabled</code> keys to your project&#x27;s <span class="leading-[1.6154] text-inherit font-semibold" data-text="true">ios/[app]/Info.plist</span>:</p><pre data-md-lang="xml" class="relative my-4 overflow-x-auto rounded-md border border-secondary bg-subtle whitespace-pre [p+&amp;]:mt-0" data-text="true"><div class="w-fit p-4"><code class="text-xs text-default"><span class="token tag"><span class="token tag"><span class="token punctuation">&lt;</span>key</span><span class="token punctuation">></span></span>LSSupportsOpeningDocumentsInPlace<span class="token tag"><span class="token tag"><span class="token punctuation">&lt;/</span>key</span><span class="token punctuation">></span></span>
<span class="token tag"><span class="token tag"><span class="token punctuation">&lt;</span>true</span><span class="token punctuation">/></span></span>
<span class="token tag"><span class="token tag"><span class="token punctuation">&lt;</span>key</span><span class="token punctuation">></span></span>UIFileSharingEnabled<span class="token tag"><span class="token tag"><span class="token punctuation">&lt;/</span>key</span><span class="token punctuation">></span></span>
<span class="token tag"><span class="token tag"><span class="token punctuation">&lt;</span>true</span><span class="token punctuation">/></span></span>
</code></div></pre></div></div></details>
<h2 class="text-inherit text-[25px] leading-[1.4] font-bold tracking-[-0.021rem] mt-8 mb-3.5 [&amp;_code]:text-[90%] max-md:text-[22px] max-md:leading-[1.409] max-sm:text-[19px] max-sm:leading-[1.5263] group flex gap-1 scroll-m-5" data-heading="true" id="usage">Usage<a href="#usage" class="border border-solid rounded-full font-medium items-center whitespace-nowrap gap-2 text-sm border-button-quaternary bg-button-quaternary text-button-quaternary shadow-none hocus:bg-button-quaternary-hover active:scale-98 relative my-auto inline-flex size-6.25 min-w-6.25 justify-center p-0 transition-all duration-default invisible opacity-0 group-hover:visible group-hover:opacity-100 group-focus-visible:visible group-focus-visible:opacity-100"><span class="flex self-center text-inherit leading-none select-none"><svg aria-label="permalink" class="icon-sm shrink-0" width="24" height="24" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><path d="M10 13a5 5 0 007.54.54l3-3a5 5 0 00-7.07-7.07l-1.72 1.71" stroke="#9B9B9B" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"></path><path d="M14 11a5 5 0 00-7.54-.54l-3 3a5 5 0 007.07 7.07l1.71-1.71" stroke="#9B9B9B" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"></path></svg></span></a></h2>
<pre data-md-lang="js" class="relative my-4 overflow-x-auto rounded-md border border-secondary bg-subtle whitespace-pre [p+&amp;]:mt-0" data-text="true"><div class="w-fit p-4"><code class="text-xs text-default"><span class="token keyword module">import</span> <span class="token imports"><span class="token punctuation">{</span> <span class="token maybe-class-name">File</span><span class="token punctuation">,</span> <span class="token maybe-class-name">Directory</span><span class="token punctuation">,</span> <span class="token maybe-class-name">Paths</span> <span class="token punctuation">}</span></span> <span class="token keyword module">from</span> <span class="token string">'expo-file-system'</span><span class="token punctuation">;</span>
</code></div></pre>
<p class="text-inherit font-normal text-base [&amp;_strong]:wrap-break-word mb-[1.5ch]" data-text="true">The <code class="text-inherit text-xs leading-[130%] font-normal inline-block rounded-md border border-secondary bg-subtle px-1 py-0.5" data-text="true">File</code> and <code class="text-inherit text-xs leading-[130%] font-normal inline-block rounded-md border border-secondary bg-subtle px-1 py-0.5" data-text="true">Directory</code> instances hold a reference to a file, content, or asset URI.</p>
<p class="text-inherit font-normal text-base [&amp;_strong]:wrap-break-word mb-[1.5ch]" data-text="true">The file or directory does not need to exist — an error will be thrown from the constructor only if the wrong class is used to represent an existing path (so if you try to create a <code class="text-inherit text-xs leading-[130%] font-normal inline-block rounded-md border border-secondary bg-subtle px-1 py-0.5" data-text="true">File</code> instance passing a path to an already existing directory).</p>
<h2 class="text-inherit text-[25px] leading-[1.4] font-bold tracking-[-0.021rem] mt-8 mb-3.5 [&amp;_code]:text-[90%] max-md:text-[22px] max-md:leading-[1.409] max-sm:text-[19px] max-sm:leading-[1.5263] group flex gap-1 scroll-m-5" data-heading="true" id="features">Features<a href="#features" class="border border-solid rounded-full font-medium items-center whitespace-nowrap gap-2 text-sm border-button-quaternary bg-button-quaternary text-button-quaternary shadow-none hocus:bg-button-quaternary-hover active:scale-98 relative my-auto inline-flex size-6.25 min-w-6.25 justify-center p-0 transition-all duration-default invisible opacity-0 group-hover:visible group-hover:opacity-100 group-focus-visible:visible group-focus-visible:opacity-100"><span class="flex self-center text-inherit leading-none select-none"><svg aria-label="permalink" class="icon-sm shrink-0" width="24" height="24" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><path d="M10 13a5 5 0 007.54.54l3-3a5 5 0 00-7.07-7.07l-1.72 1.71" stroke="#9B9B9B" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"></path><path d="M14 11a5 5 0 00-7.54-.54l-3 3a5 5 0 007.07 7.07l1.71-1.71" stroke="#9B9B9B" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"></path></svg></span></a></h2>
<ul class="leading-[1.6154] text-inherit list-disc ml-6 [&amp;_ol]:mt-2 [&amp;_ol]:mb-4 [&amp;_ul]:mt-2 [&amp;_ul]:mb-4 mb-[1.5ch] pl-[1ch]">
<li class="text-inherit text-base leading-relaxed font-normal mb-2" data-text="true">Both synchronous and asynchronous, read and write access to file contents</li>
<li class="text-inherit text-base leading-relaxed font-normal mb-2" data-text="true">Creation, modification and deletion</li>
<li class="text-inherit text-base leading-relaxed font-normal mb-2" data-text="true">Available properties, such as <code class="text-inherit text-xs leading-[130%] font-normal inline-block rounded-md border border-secondary bg-subtle px-1 py-0.5" data-text="true">type</code>, <code class="text-inherit text-xs leading-[130%] font-normal inline-block rounded-md border border-secondary bg-subtle px-1 py-0.5" data-text="true">size</code>, <code class="text-inherit text-xs leading-[130%] font-normal inline-block rounded-md border border-secondary bg-subtle px-1 py-0.5" data-text="true">creationDate</code>, and more</li>
<li class="text-inherit text-base leading-relaxed font-normal mb-2" data-text="true">Ability to read and write files as streams or using the <code class="text-inherit text-xs leading-[130%] font-normal inline-block rounded-md border border-secondary bg-subtle px-1 py-0.5" data-text="true">FileHandle</code> class</li>
<li class="text-inherit text-base leading-relaxed font-normal mb-2" data-text="true">Easy file download/upload using <code class="text-inherit text-xs leading-[130%] font-normal inline-block rounded-md border border-secondary bg-subtle px-1 py-0.5" data-text="true">downloadFileAsync</code> or <code class="text-inherit text-xs leading-[130%] font-normal inline-block rounded-md border border-secondary bg-subtle px-1 py-0.5" data-text="true">expo/fetch</code></li>
</ul>
<h2 class="text-inherit text-[25px] leading-[1.4] font-bold tracking-[-0.021rem] mt-8 mb-3.5 [&amp;_code]:text-[90%] max-md:text-[22px] max-md:leading-[1.409] max-sm:text-[19px] max-sm:leading-[1.5263] group flex gap-1 scroll-m-5" data-heading="true" id="examples">Examples<a href="#examples" class="border border-solid rounded-full font-medium items-center whitespace-nowrap gap-2 text-sm border-button-quaternary bg-button-quaternary text-button-quaternary shadow-none hocus:bg-button-quaternary-hover active:scale-98 relative my-auto inline-flex size-6.25 min-w-6.25 justify-center p-0 transition-all duration-default invisible opacity-0 group-hover:visible group-hover:opacity-100 group-focus-visible:visible group-focus-visible:opacity-100"><span class="flex self-center text-inherit leading-none select-none"><svg aria-label="permalink" class="icon-sm shrink-0" width="24" height="24" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><path d="M10 13a5 5 0 007.54.54l3-3a5 5 0 00-7.07-7.07l-1.72 1.71" stroke="#9B9B9B" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"></path><path d="M14 11a5 5 0 00-7.54-.54l-3 3a5 5 0 007.07 7.07l1.71-1.71" stroke="#9B9B9B" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"></path></svg></span></a></h2>
<details id="writing-and-reading-text-files" class="mb-3 scroll-m-4 rounded-md border border-default bg-default p-0 [&amp;[open]]:shadow-xs [h4+&amp;]:mt-3 [li&gt;&amp;]:mt-3 [p+&amp;]:mt-3" border-default bg-subtle leading-4.5! text-default prose-code:px-0! p-0"><pre data-md-lang="ts" class="relative whitespace-pre" data-text="true"><div class="w-fit p-4"><code class="text-xs text-default"><span class="token keyword">import</span> <span class="token punctuation">{</span> File<span class="token punctuation">,</span> Paths <span class="token punctuation">}</span> <span class="token keyword">from</span> <span class="token string">'expo-file-system'</span><span class="token punctuation">;</span>

<span class="token keyword">try</span> <span class="token punctuation">{</span>
  <span class="token keyword">const</span> file <span class="token operator">=</span> <span class="token keyword">new</span> <span class="token class-name">File</span><span class="token punctuation">(</span>Paths<span class="token punctuation">.</span>cache<span class="token punctuation">,</span> <span class="token string">'example.txt'</span><span class="token punctuation">)</span><span class="token punctuation">;</span>
  file<span class="token punctuation">.</span><span class="token function">create</span><span class="token punctuation">(</span><span class="token punctuation">)</span><span class="token punctuation">;</span> <span class="token comment">// can throw an error if the file already exists or no permission to create it</span>
  file<span class="token punctuation">.</span><span class="token function">write</span><span class="token punctuation">(</span><span class="token string">'Hello, world!'</span><span class="token punctuation">)</span><span class="token punctuation">;</span>
  <span class="token builtin">console</span><span class="token punctuation">.</span><span class="token function">log</span><span class="token punctuation">(</span>file<span class="token punctuation">.</span><span class="token function">textSync</span><span class="token punctuation">(</span><span class="token punctuation">)</span><span class="token punctuation">)</span><span class="token punctuation">;</span> <span class="token comment">// Hello, world!</span>
<span class="token punctuation">}</span> <span class="token keyword">catch</span> <span class="token punctuation">(</span>error<span class="token punctuation">)</span> <span class="token punctuation">{</span>
  <span class="token builtin">console</span><span class="token punctuation">.</span><span class="token function">error</span><span class="token punctuation">(</span>error<span class="token punctuation">)</span><span class="token punctuation">;</span>
<span class="token punctuation">}</span>
</code></div></pre></div></div></div></div></details>

class="token punctuation">{</span> File <span class="token punctuation">}</span> <span class="token keyword">from</span> <span class="token string">'expo-file-system'</span><span class="token punctuation">;</span>
<span class="token keyword">import</span> <span class="token operator">*</span> <span class="token keyword">as</span> DocumentPicker <span class="token keyword">from</span> <span class="token string">'expo-document-picker'</span><span class="token punctuation">;</span>

<span class="token keyword">try</span> <span class="token punctuation">{</span>
  <span class="token keyword">const</span> result <span class="token operator">=</span> <span class="token keyword">await</span> DocumentPicker<span class="token punctuation">.</span><span class="token function">getDocumentAsync</span><span class="token punctuation">(</span><span class="token punctuation">{</span> copyToCacheDirectory<span class="token operator">:</span> <span class="token boolean">true</span> <span class="token punctuation">}</span><span class="token punctuation">)</span><span class="token punctuation">;</span>
  <span class="token keyword">if</span> <span class="token punctuation">(</span><span class="token operator">!</span>result<span class="token punctuation">.</span>canceled<span class="token punctuation">)</span> <span class="token punctuation">{</span>
    <span class="token keyword">const</span> <span class="token punctuation">{</span> uri <span class="token punctuation">}</span> <span class="token operator">=</span> result<span class="token punctuation">.</span>assets<span class="token punctuation">[</span><span class="token number">0</span><span class="token punctuation">]</span><span class="token punctuation">;</span>
    <span class="token keyword">const</span> file <span class="token operator">=</span> <span class="token keyword">new</span> <span class="token class-name">File</span><span class="token punctuation">(</span>uri<span class="token punctuation">)</span><span class="token punctuation">;</span>
    <span class="token builtin">console</span><span class="token punctuation">.</span><span class="token function">log</span><span class="token punctuation">(</span>file<span class="token punctuation">.</span><span class="token function">textSync</span><span class="token punctuation">(</span><span class="token punctuation">)</span><span class="token punctuation">)</span><span class="token punctuation">;</span>
  <span class="token punctuation">}</span>
<span class="token punctuation">}</span> <span class="token keyword">catch</span> <span class="token punctuation">(</span>error<span class="token punctuation">)</span> <span class="token punctuation">{</span>
  <span class="token builtin">console</span><span class="token punctuation">.</span><span class="token function">error</span><span class="token punctuation">(</span>error<span class="token punctuation">)</span><span class="token punctuation">;</span>
<span class="token punctuation">}</span>
</code></div></pre></div></div><p class="text-inherit font-normal text-base [&amp;_strong]:wrap-break-word mb-[1.5ch]" data-text="true">Using the built-in <code class="text-inherit text-xs leading-[130%] font-normal inline-block rounded-md border border-secondary bg-subtle px-1 py-0.5" data-text="true">pickFileAsync</code> or <code class="text-inherit text-xs leading-[130%] font-normal text-default"><span class="token keyword">import</span> <span class="token punctuation">{</span> Directory<span class="token punctuation">,</span> File<span class="token punctuation">,</span> Paths <span class="token punctuation">}</span> <span class="token keyword">from</span> <span class="token string">'expo-file-system'</span><span class="token punctuation">;</span>

<span class="token keyword">const</span> url <span class="token operator">=</span> <span class="token string">'https://pdfobject.com/pdf/sample.pdf'</span><span class="token punctuation">;</span>
<span class="token keyword">const</span> destination <span class="token operator">=</span> <span class="token keyword">new</span> <span class="token class-name">Directory</span><span class="token punctuation">(</span>Paths<span class="token punctuation">.</span>cache<span class="token punctuation">,</span> <span class="token string">'pdfs'</span><span class="token punctuation">)</span><span class="token punctuation">;</span>
<span class="token keyword">try</span> <span class="token punctuation">{</span>
  destination<span class="token punctuation">.</span><span class="token function">create</span><span class="token punctuation">(</span><span class="token punctuation">)</span><span class="token punctuation">;</span>
  <span class="token keyword">const</span> output <span class="token operator">=</span> <span class="token keyword">await</span> File<span class="token punctuation">.</span><span class="token function">downloadFileAsync</span><span class="token punctuation">(</span>url<span class="token punctuation">,</span> destination<span class="token punctuation">)</span><span class="token punctuation">;</span>
  <span class="token builtin">console</span><span class="token punctuation">.</span><span class="token function">log</span><span class="token punctuation">(</span>output<span class="token punctuation">.</span>exists<span class="token punctuation">)</span><span class="token punctuation">;</span> <span class="token comment">// true</span>
  <span class="token builtin">console</span><span class="token punctuation">.</span><span class="token function">log</span><span class="token punctuation">(</span>output<span class="token punctuation">.</span>uri<span class="token punctuation">)</span><span class="token punctuation">;</span> <span class="token comment">// path to the downloaded file, e.g., '${cacheDirectory}/pdfs/sample.pdf'</span>
<span class="token punctuation">}</span> <span class="token keyword">catch</span> <span class="token punctuation">(</span>error<span class="token punctuation">)</span> <span class="token punctuation">{</span>
  <span class="token builtin">console</span><span class="token punctuation">.</span><span class="token function">error</span><span class="token punctuation">(</span>error<span class="token punctuation">)</span><span class="token punctuation">;</span>
<span class="token punctuation">}</span>
</code></div></pre></div></div><p class="text-inherit font-normal text-base [&amp;_strong]:wrap-break-word mb-[1.5ch]" data-text="true">Or using <code class="text-inherit text-xs leading-[130%] text-default"><span class="token keyword">import</span> <span class="token punctuation">{</span> fetch <span class="token punctuation">}</span> <span class="token keyword">from</span> <span class="token string">'expo/fetch'</span><span class="token punctuation">;</span>
<span class="token keyword">import</span> <span class="token punctuation">{</span> File<span class="token punctuation">,</span> Paths <span class="token punctuation">}</span> <span class="token keyword">from</span> <span class="token string">'expo-file-system'</span><span class="token punctuation">;</span>

<span class="token keyword">const</span> url <span class="token operator">=</span> <span class="token string">'https://pdfobject.com/pdf/sample.pdf'</span><span class="token punctuation">;</span>
<span class="token keyword">const</span> response <span class="token operator">=</span> <span class="token keyword">await</span> <span class="token function">fetch</span><span class="token punctuation">(</span>url<span class="token punctuation">)</span><span class="token punctuation">;</span>
<span class="token keyword">const</span> src <span class="token operator">=</span> <span class="token keyword">new</span> <span class="token class-name">File</span><span class="token punctuation">(</span>Paths<span class="token punctuation">.</span>cache<span class="token punctuation">,</span> <span class="token string">'file.pdf'</span><span class="token punctuation">)</span><span class="token punctuation">;</span>
src<span class="token punctuation">.</span><span class="token function">write</span><span class="token punctuation">(</span><span class="token keyword">await</span> response<span class="token punctuation">.</span><span class="token function">bytes</span><span class="token punctuation">(</span><span class="token punctuation">)</span><span class="token punctuation">)</span><span class="token punctuation">;</span>
</code></div></pre></div></div></div></div></details>

punctuation">;</span>
<span class="token keyword">import</span> <span class="token punctuation">{</span> File<span class="token punctuation">,</span> Paths <span class="token punctuation">}</span> <span class="token keyword">from</span> <span class="token string">'expo-file-system'</span><span class="token punctuation">;</span>

<span class="token keyword">const</span> file <span class="token operator">=</span> <span class="token keyword">new</span> <span class="token class-name">File</span><span class="token punctuation">(</span>Paths<span class="token punctuation">.</span>cache<span class="token punctuation">,</span> <span class="token string">'file.txt'</span><span class="token punctuation">)</span><span class="token punctuation">;</span>

<span class="token keyword">const</span> response <span class="token operator">=</span> <span class="token keyword">await</span> <span class="token function">fetch</span><span class="token punctuation">(</span><span class="token string">'https://example.com'</span><span class="token punctuation">,</span> <span class="token punctuation">{</span>
  method<span class="token operator">:</span> <span class="token string">'POST'</span><span class="token punctuation">,</span>
  body<span class="token operator">:</span> file<span class="token punctuation">,</span>
<span class="token punctuation">}</span><span class="token punctuation">)</span><span class="token punctuation">;</span>
</code></div></pre></div></div><p class="text-inherit font-normal text-base [&amp;_strong]:wrap-break-word mb-[1.5ch]" data-text="true">Or using the <code class="text-inherit text-xs leading-[130%] <span class="token punctuation">}</span> <span class="token keyword">from</span> <span class="token string">'expo/fetch'</span><span class="token punctuation">;</span>
<span class="token keyword">import</span> <span class="token punctuation">{</span> File<span class="token punctuation">,</span> Paths <span class="token punctuation">}</span> <span class="token keyword">from</span> <span class="token string">'expo-file-system'</span><span class="token punctuation">;</span>

<span class="token keyword">const</span> file <span class="token operator">=</span> <span class="token keyword">new</span> <span class="token class-name">File</span><span class="token punctuation">(</span>Paths<span class="token punctuation">.</span>cache<span class="token punctuation">,</span> <span class="token string">'file.txt'</span><span class="token punctuation">)</span><span class="token punctuation">;</span>
file<span class="token punctuation">.</span><span class="token function">write</span><span class="token punctuation">(</span><span class="token string">'Hello, world!'</span><span class="token punctuation">)</span><span class="token punctuation">;</span>
<span class="token keyword">const</span> formData <span class="token operator">=</span> <span class="token keyword">new</span> <span class="token class-name">FormData</span><span class="token punctuation">(</span><span class="token punctuation">)</span><span class="token punctuation">;</span>
formData<span class="token punctuation">.</span><span class="token function">append</span><span class="token punctuation">(</span><span class="token string">'data'</span><span class="token punctuation">,</span> file<span class="token punctuation">)</span><span class="token punctuation">;</span>
<span class="token keyword">const</span> response <span class="token operator">=</span> <span class="token keyword">await</span> <span class="token function">fetch</span><span class="token punctuation">(</span><span class="token string">'https://example.com'</span><span class="token punctuation">,</span> <span class="token punctuation">{</span>
  method<span class="token operator">:</span> <span class="token string">'POST'</span><span class="token punctuation">,</span>
  body<span class="token operator">:</span> formData<span class="token punctuation">,</span>
<span class="token punctuation">}</span><span class="token punctuation">)</span><span class="token punctuation">;</span>
</code></div></pre></div></div></div></div></details>

prose-code:px-0! p-0"><pre data-md-lang="ts" class="relative whitespace-pre" data-text="true"><div class="w-fit p-4"><code class="text-xs text-default"><span class="token keyword">import</span> <span class="token punctuation">{</span> Directory<span class="token punctuation">,</span> File<span class="token punctuation">,</span> Paths <span class="token punctuation">}</span> <span class="token keyword">from</span> <span class="token string">'expo-file-system'</span><span class="token punctuation">;</span>
<span class="token keyword">try</span> <span class="token punctuation">{</span>
  <span class="token keyword">const</span> file <span class="token operator">=</span> <span class="token keyword">new</span> <span class="token class-name">File</span><span class="token punctuation">(</span>Paths<span class="token punctuation">.</span>document<span class="token punctuation">,</span> <span class="token string">'example.txt'</span><span class="token punctuation">)</span><span class="token punctuation">;</span>
  file<span class="token punctuation">.</span><span class="token function">create</span><span class="token punctuation">(</span><span class="token punctuation">)</span><span class="token punctuation">;</span>
  <span class="token builtin">console</span><span class="token punctuation">.</span><span class="token function">log</span><span class="token punctuation">(</span>file<span class="token punctuation">.</span>uri<span class="token punctuation">)</span><span class="token punctuation">;</span> <span class="token comment">// '${documentDirectory}/example.txt'</span>
  <span class="token keyword">const</span> copiedFile <span class="token operator">=</span> <span class="token keyword">new</span> <span class="token class-name">File</span><span class="token punctuation">(</span>Paths<span class="token punctuation">.</span>cache<span class="token punctuation">,</span> <span class="token string">'example-copy.txt'</span><span class="token punctuation">)</span><span class="token punctuation">;</span>
  file<span class="token punctuation">.</span><span class="token function">copy</span><span class="token punctuation">(</span>copiedFile<span class="token punctuation">)</span><span class="token punctuation">;</span>
  <span class="token builtin">console</span><span class="token punctuation">.</span><span class="token function">log</span><span class="token punctuation">(</span>copiedFile<span class="token punctuation">.</span>uri<span class="token punctuation">)</span><span class="token punctuation">;</span> <span class="token comment">// '${cacheDirectory}/example-copy.txt'</span>
  file<span class="token punctuation">.</span><span class="token function">move</span><span class="token punctuation">(</span>Paths<span class="token punctuation">.</span>cache<span class="token punctuation">)</span><span class="token punctuation">;</span>
  <span class="token builtin">console</span><span class="token punctuation">.</span><span class="token function">log</span><span class="token punctuation">(</span>file<span class="token punctuation">.</span>uri<span class="token punctuation">)</span><span class="token punctuation">;</span> <span class="token comment">// '${cacheDirectory}/example.txt'</span>
  file<span class="token punctuation">.</span><span class="token function">move</span><span class="token punctuation">(</span><span class="token keyword">new</span> <span class="token class-name">Directory</span><span class="token punctuation">(</span>Paths<span class="token punctuation">.</span>cache<span class="token punctuation">,</span> <span class="token string">'newFolder'</span><span class="token punctuation">)</span><span class="token punctuation">)</span><span class="token punctuation">;</span>
  <span class="token builtin">console</span><span class="token punctuation">.</span><span class="token function">log</span><span class="token punctuation">(</span>file<span class="token punctuation">.</span>uri<span class="token punctuation">)</span><span class="token punctuation">;</span> <span class="token comment">// '${cacheDirectory}/newFolder/example.txt'</span>
<span class="token punctuation">}</span> <span class="token keyword">catch</span> <span class="token punctuation">(</span>error<span class="token punctuation">)</span> <span class="token punctuation">{</span>
  <span class="token builtin">console</span><span class="token punctuation">.</span><span class="token function">error</span><span class="token punctuation">(</span>error<span class="token punctuation">)</span><span class="token punctuation">;</span>
<span class="token punctuation">}</span>
</code></div></pre></div></div></div></div></details>

text-default"><span class="token keyword">import</span> <span class="token operator">*</span> <span class="token keyword">as</span> FileSystem <span class="token keyword">from</span> <span class="token string">'expo-file-system/legacy'</span><span class="token punctuation">;</span>
<span class="token keyword">import</span> <span class="token punctuation">{</span> File<span class="token punctuation">,</span> Paths <span class="token punctuation">}</span> <span class="token keyword">from</span> <span class="token string">'expo-file-system'</span><span class="token punctuation">;</span>

<span class="token keyword">try</span> <span class="token punctuation">{</span>
  <span class="token keyword">const</span> file <span class="token operator">=</span> <span class="token keyword">new</span> <span class="token class-name">File</span><span class="token punctuation">(</span>Paths<span class="token punctuation">.</span>cache<span class="token punctuation">,</span> <span class="token string">'example.txt'</span><span class="token punctuation">)</span><span class="token punctuation">;</span>
  <span class="token keyword">const</span> content <span class="token operator">=</span> <span class="token keyword">await</span> FileSystem<span class="token punctuation">.</span><span class="token function">readAsStringAsync</span><span class="token punctuation">(</span>file<span class="token punctuation">.</span>uri<span class="token punctuation">)</span><span class="token punctuation">;</span>
  <span class="token builtin">console</span><span class="token punctuation">.</span><span class="token function">log</span><span class="token punctuation">(</span>content<span class="token punctuation">)</span><span class="token punctuation">;</span>
<span class="token punctuation">}</span> <span class="token keyword">catch</span> <span class="token punctuation">(</span>error<span class="token punctuation">)</span> <span class="token punctuation">{</span>
  <span class="token builtin">console</span><span class="token punctuation">.</span><span class="token function">error</span><span class="token punctuation">(</span>error<span class="token punctuation">)</span><span class="token punctuation">;</span>
<span class="token punctuation">}</span>
</code></div></pre></div></div></div></div></details>

text-default"><span class="token keyword">import</span> <span class="token punctuation">{</span> Directory<span class="token punctuation">,</span> Paths <span class="token punctuation">}</span> <span class="token keyword">from</span> <span class="token string">'expo-file-system'</span><span class="token punctuation">;</span>

<span class="token keyword">function</span> <span class="token function">printDirectory</span><span class="token punctuation">(</span>directory<span class="token operator">:</span> Directory<span class="token punctuation">,</span> indent<span class="token operator">:</span> <span class="token builtin">number</span> <span class="token operator">=</span> <span class="token number">0</span><span class="token punctuation">)</span> <span class="token punctuation">{</span>
  <span class="token builtin">console</span><span class="token punctuation">.</span><span class="token function">log</span><span class="token punctuation">(</span><span class="token template-string"><span class="token template-punctuation string">`</span><span class="token interpolation"><span class="token interpolation-punctuation punctuation">${</span><span class="token string">' '</span><span class="token punctuation">.</span><span class="token function">repeat</span><span class="token punctuation">(</span>indent<span class="token punctuation">)</span><span class="token interpolation-punctuation punctuation">}</span></span><span class="token string"> + </span><span class="token interpolation"><span class="token interpolation-punctuation punctuation">${</span>directory<span class="token punctuation">.</span>name<span class="token interpolation-punctuation punctuation">}</span></span><span class="token template-punctuation string">`</span></span><span class="token punctuation">)</span><span class="token punctuation">;</span>
  <span class="token keyword">const</span> contents <span class="token operator">=</span> directory<span class="token punctuation">.</span><span class="token function">list</span><span class="token punctuation">(</span><span class="token punctuation">)</span><span class="token punctuation">;</span>
  <span class="token keyword">for</span> <span class="token punctuation">(</span><span class="token keyword">const</span> item <span class="token keyword">of</span> contents<span class="token punctuation">)</span> <span class="token punctuation">{</span>
    <span class="token keyword">if</span> <span class="token punctuation">(</span>item <span class="token keyword">instanceof</span> <span class="token class-name">Directory</span><span class="token punctuation">)</span> <span class="token punctuation">{</span>
      <span class="token function">printDirectory</span><span class="token punctuation">(</span>item<span class="token punctuation">,</span> indent <span class="token operator">+</span> <span class="token number">2</span><span class="token punctuation">)</span><span class="token punctuation">;</span>
    <span class="token punctuation">}</span> <span class="token keyword">else</span> <span class="token punctuation">{</span>
      <span class="token builtin">console</span><span class="token punctuation">.</span><span class="token function">log</span><span class="token punctuation">(</span><span class="token template-string"><span class="token template-punctuation string">`</span><span class="token interpolation"><span class="token interpolation-punctuation punctuation">${</span><span class="token string">' '</span><span class="token punctuation">.</span><span class="token function">repeat</span><span class="token punctuation">(</span>indent <span class="token operator">+</span> <span class="token number">2</span><span class="token punctuation">)</span><span class="token interpolation-punctuation punctuation">}</span></span><span class="token string"> - </span><span class="token interpolation"><span class="token interpolation-punctuation punctuation">${</span>item<span class="token punctuation">.</span>name<span class="token interpolation-punctuation punctuation">}</span></span><span class="token string"> (</span><span class="token interpolation"><span class="token interpolation-punctuation punctuation">${</span>item<span class="token punctuation">.</span>size<span class="token interpolation-punctuation punctuation">}</span></span><span class="token string"> bytes)</span><span class="token template-punctuation string">`</span></span><span class="token punctuation">)</span><span class="token punctuation">;</span>
    <span class="token punctuation">}</span>
  <span class="token punctuation">}</span>
<span class="token punctuation">}</span>

<span class="token keyword">try</span> <span class="token punctuation">{</span>
  <span class="token function">printDirectory</span><span class="token punctuation">(</span><span class="token keyword">new</span> <span class="token class-name">Directory</span><span class="token punctuation">(</span>Paths<span class="token punctuation">.</span>cache<span class="token punctuation">)</span><span class="token punctuation">)</span><span class="token punctuation">;</span>
<span class="token punctuation">}</span> <span class="token keyword">catch</span> <span class="token punctuation">(</span>error<span class="token punctuation">)</span> <span class="token punctuation">{</span>
  <span class="token builtin">console</span><span class="token punctuation">.</span><span class="token function">error</span><span class="token punctuation">(</span>error<span class="token punctuation">)</span><span class="token punctuation">;</span>
<span class="token punctuation">}</span>
</code></div></pre></div></div></div></div></details>

data-text="true"><span class="font-medium">Type: </span><span>Class</span><span> extends </span><code class="text-inherit text-xs leading-[130%] font-normal inline-block rounded-md border border-secondary bg-subtle px-1 py-0.5" data-text="true">FileSystemDirectory</code></p><div class="px-4 [table_&amp;]:mb-0! [table_&amp;]:px-0"><p class="text-inherit font-normal text-[14px] leading-[1.5715] tracking-[-0.006rem] mb-2.5 [table_&amp;]:last:mb-0" data-text="true">Represents a directory on the filesystem.</p>
<p class="text-inherit font-normal text-[14px] leading-[1.5715] tracking-[-0.006rem] mb-2.5 [table_&amp;]:last:mb-0" data-text="true">A <code class="text-inherit text-xs leading-[130%] font-normal inline-block rounded-md border border-secondary bg-subtle px-1 inline! py-0 wrap-break-word" data-text="true">Directory</code> instance can be created for any path, and does not need to exist on the filesystem during creation.</p>
<p class="text-inherit font-normal text-[14px] leading-[1.5715] tracking-[-0.006rem] mb-2.5 [table_&amp;]:last:mb-0" data-text="true">The constructor accepts an array of strings that are joined to create the directory URI. The first argument can also be a <code class="text-inherit text-xs leading-[130%] font-normal inline-block rounded-md border border-secondary bg-subtle px-1 inline! py-0 wrap-break-word" data-text="true">Directory</code> instance (like <code class="text-inherit text-xs leading-[130%] font-normal inline-block rounded-md border border-secondary bg-subtle px-1 inline! py-0 wrap-break-word" data-text="true">Paths.cache</code>).</p><div class="mb-2.5 [table_&amp;]:last:mb-0 [&amp;&gt;*:last-child]:mb-0!"><p class="tracking-[-0.006rem] flex border-y border-palette-gray4 bg-subtle px-4 py-2 text-xs font-medium text-tertiary -mx-4 mt-1 mb-3" data-text="true"><span class="tracking-[-0.006rem] flex flex-row items-center gap-2 text-xs font-medium text-tertiary" data-text="true"><svg fill="none" viewBox="0 0 24 24" stroke="currentColor" class="translate-z shrink-0 icon-sm text-icon-secondary" role="img" aria-hidden="true"><g id="code-square-01-outline-icon"><path id="Icon" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" stroke-width="2" d="M14.5 15L17.5 12L14.5 9M9.5 9L6.5 12L9.5 15M7.8 21H16.2C17.8802 21 18.7202 21 19.362 20.673C19.9265 20.3854 20.3854 19.9265 20.673 19.362C21 18.7202 21 17.8802 21 16.2V7.8C21 6.11984 21 5.27976 20.673 4.63803C20.3854 4.07354 19.9265 3.6146 19.362 3.32698C18.7202 3 17.8802 3 16.2 3H7.8C6.11984 3 5.27976 3 4.63803 3.32698C4.07354 3.6146 3.6146 4.07354 3.32698 4.63803C3 5.27976 3 6.11984 3 7.8V16.2C3 17.8802 3 18.7202 3.32698 19.362C3.6146 19.9265 4.07354 20.3854 4.63803 20.673C5.27976 21 6.11984 21 7.8 21Z"></path></g></svg>Example</span></p><pre data-md-lang="ts" class="relative my-4 overflow-x-auto rounded-md border border-secondary bg-subtle whitespace-pre [p+&amp;]:mt-0" data-text="true"><div class="w-fit p-4"><code class="text-xs text-default"><span class="token keyword">const</span> directory <span class="token operator">=</span> <span class="token keyword">new</span> <span class="token class-name">Directory</span><span class="token punctuation">(</span>Paths<span class="token punctuation">.</span>cache<span class="token punctuation">,</span> <span class="token string">"subdirName"</span><span class="token punctuation">)</span><span class="token punctuation">;</span>
</code></div></pre></div></div><p class="tracking-[-0.006rem] flex border-y border-palette-gray4 bg-subtle px-4 py-2 text-xs font-medium text-tertiary" data-text="true"><span class="tracking-[-0.006rem] flex flex-row items-center gap-2 text-xs font-medium text-tertiary" data-text="true">Directory Properties</span></p><div><div class="border-t border-palette-gray4 [&amp;_code]:hocus:underline [&amp;_b]:text-link [&amp;_code]:text-link [&amp;_em]:text-link [&amp;_i]:text-link [&amp;_span]:text-link [&amp;_strong]:text-link">Directory</a></span></span><span class="text-quaternary">&gt;</span></span><span class="text-quaternary">) =&gt;</span> <!-- -->void</code></td><td class="border-r border-secondary p-4 text-left last:border-r-0 [&amp;&gt;*]:last:mb-0!"><div class="px-4 [table_&amp;]:mb-0! [table_&amp;]:px-0"><p class="text-inherit font-normal text-[14px] leading-[1.5715] tracking-[-0.006rem] mb-2.5 [table_&amp;]:last:mb-0" data-text="true">Invoked when a change is detected. Receives a <code class="text-inherit text-xs leading-[130%] font-normal inline-block rounded-md border border-secondary bg-subtle px-1 inline! py-0 wrap-break-word" data-text="true">WatchEvent</code> describing what changed.</p></div></td></tr><tr class="even:bg-subtle"><td class="border-r border-secondary p-4 text-left last:border-r-0"><span class="leading-[1.6154] text-inherit font-medium" data-text="true" data-md="api-param-name">options</span><span class="flex text-xs! text-tertiary">(optional)</span></td><td class="border-r border-secondary p-4 text-left last:border-r-0"><code class="text-inherit text-xs leading-[130%] font-normal inline-block rounded-md border border-secondary bg-subtle px-1 py-0.5 [&amp;&gt;span]:text-inherit!" data-text="true"><a href="#watchoptions" class="cursor-pointer decoration-0 hocus:opacity-80 font-normal text-link visited:text-link hocus:underline [&amp;_code]:hocus:underline [&amp;_b]:text-link [&amp;_code]:text-link [&amp;_em]:text-link [&amp;_i]:text-link [&amp;_span]:text-link [&amp;_strong]:text-link">WatchOptions</a></code></td><td class="border-r border-secondary p-4 text-left last:border-r-0 [&amp;&gt;*]:last:mb-0!"><div class="px-4 [table_&amp;]:mb-0! [table_&amp;]:px-0"><p class="text-inherit font-normal text-[14px] leading-[1.5715] tracking-[-0.006rem] mb-2.5 [table_&amp;]:last:mb-0" data-text="true">Configuration for debouncing and filtering events.</p></div></td></tr></tbody></table></div><br/><div class="px-4 [table_&amp;]:mb-0! [table_&amp;]:px-0"><p class="text-inherit font-normal text-[14px] leading-[1.5715] tracking-[-0.006rem] mb-2.5 [table_&amp;]:last:mb-0" data-text="true">Watches this directory for changes to its contents or the directory itself.</p>
<p class="text-inherit font-normal text-[14px] leading-[1.5715] tracking-[-0.006rem] mb-2.5 [table_&amp;]:last:mb-0" data-text="true">Events are emitted when files or subdirectories are created, modified, deleted, or renamed
within this directory. On iOS, child changes are surfaced as a coarse-grained <code class="text-inherit text-xs leading-[130%] font-normal inline-block rounded-md border border-secondary bg-subtle px-1 inline! py-0 wrap-break-word" data-text="true">modified</code> event
on the directory itself, so filtering for child-level <code class="text-inherit text-xs leading-[130%] font-normal inline-block rounded-md border border-secondary bg-subtle px-1 inline! py-0 wrap-break-word" data-text="true">created</code>, <code class="text-inherit text-xs leading-[130%] font-normal inline-block rounded-md border border-secondary bg-subtle px-1 inline! py-0 wrap-break-word" data-text="true">deleted</code>, or <code class="text-inherit text-xs leading-[130%] font-normal inline-block rounded-md border border-secondary bg-subtle px-1 inline! py-0 wrap-break-word" data-text="true">renamed</code> events
is not reliable. The watcher automatically stops when the directory is deleted or renamed.
To stop watching manually, call <code class="text-inherit text-xs leading-[130%] font-normal inline-block rounded-md border border-secondary bg-subtle px-1 inline! py-0 wrap-break-word" data-text="true">remove()</code> on the returned subscription.</p><div data-md="api-returns" class="flex flex-row items-start gap-2"><div class="flex flex-row items-center gap-2"><svg fill="none" viewBox="0 0 24 24" stroke="currentColor" class="translate-z shrink-0 relative -mt-0.5 inline-block icon-sm text-icon-tertiary" role="img" aria-hidden="true"><g id="corner-down-right-outline-icon"><path id="Icon" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" stroke-width="2" d="M4 4V5.4C4 8.76031 4 10.4405 4.65396 11.7239C5.2292 12.8529 6.14708 13.7708 7.27606 14.346C8.55953 15 10.2397 15 13.6 15H20M15 20L20 15L15 10"></path></g></svg><span class="text-sm font-medium text-tertiary">Returns:</span></div><code class="text-inherit text-xs leading-[130%] font-normal inline-block rounded-md border border-secondary bg-subtle px-1 py-0.5 [&amp;&gt;span]:text-inherit!" data-text="true"><a href="#watchsubscription" class="cursor-pointer decoration-0 hocus:opacity-80 font-normal text-link visited:text-link hocus:underline [&amp;_code]:hocus:underline [&amp;_b]:text-link [&amp;_code]:text-link [&amp;_em]:text-link [&amp;_i]:text-link [&amp;_span]:text-link [&amp;_strong]:text-link">WatchSubscription</a></code></div><div class="mt-1.5 mb-1 flex flex-col pl-6"><div class=""><p class="text-inherit font-normal text-[14px] leading-[1.5715] tracking-[-0.006rem] mb-2.5 [table_&amp;]:last:mb-0" data-text="true">A subscription handle. Call <code class="text-inherit text-xs leading-[130%] font-normal inline-block rounded-md border border-secondary bg-subtle px-1 inline! py-0 wrap-break-word" data-text="true">remove()</code> to stop watching.</p></div></div><div class="mb-2.5 [table_&amp;]:last:mb-0 [&amp;&gt;*:last-child]:mb-0!"><p class="tracking-[-0.006rem] flex border-y border-palette-gray4 bg-subtle px-4 py-2 text-xs font-medium text-tertiary -mx-4 mt-1 mb-3" data-text="true"><span class="tracking-[-0.006rem] flex flex-row items-center gap-2 text-xs font-medium text-tertiary" data-text="true"><svg fill="none" viewBox="0 0 24 24" stroke="currentColor" class="translate-z shrink-0 icon-sm text-icon-secondary" role="img" aria-hidden="true"><g id="code-square-01-outline-icon"><path id="Icon" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" stroke-width="2" d="M14.5 15L17.5 12L14.5 9M9.5 9L6.5 12L9.5 15M7.8 21H16.2C17.8802 21 18.7202 21 19.362 20.673C19.9265 20.3854 20.3854 19.9265 20.673 19.362C21 18.7202 21 17.8802 21 16.2V7.8C21 6.11984 21 5.27976 20.673 4.63803C20.3854 4.07354 19.9265 3.6146 19.362 3.32698C18.7202 3 17.8802 3 16.2 3H7.8C6.11984 3 5.27976 3 4.63803 3.32698C4.07354 3.6146 3.6146 4.07354 3.32698 4.63803C3 5.27976 3 6.11984 3 7.8V16.2C3 17.8802 3 18.7202 3.32698 19.362C3.6146 19.9265 4.07354 20.3854 4.63803 20.673C5.27976 21 6.11984 21 7.8 21Z"></path></g></svg>Example</span></p><pre data-md-lang="ts" class="relative my-4 overflow-x-auto rounded-md border border-secondary bg-subtle whitespace-pre [p+&amp;]:mt-0" data-text="true"><div class="w-fit p-4"><code class="text-xs text-default"><span class="token keyword">const</span> cacheDir <span class="token operator">=</span> <span class="token keyword">new</span> <span class="token class-name">Directory</span><span class="token punctuation">(</span>Paths<span class="token punctuation">.</span>cache<span class="token punctuation">)</span><span class="token punctuation">;</span>
<span class="token keyword">const</span> subscription <span class="token operator">=</span> cacheDir<span class="token punctuation">.</span><span class="token function">watch</span><span class="token punctuation">(</span><span class="token punctuation">(</span>event<span class="token punctuation">)</span> <span class="token operator">=></span> <span class="token punctuation">{</span>
  <span class="token builtin">console</span><span class="token punctuation">.</span><span class="token function">log</span><span class="token punctuation">(</span><span class="token template-string"><span class="token template-punctuation string">`</span><span class="token interpolation"><span class="token interpolation-punctuation punctuation">${</span>event<span class="token punctuation">.</span><span class="token keyword">type</span><span class="token interpolation-punctuation punctuation">}</span></span><span class="token string">: </span><span class="token interpolation"><span class="token interpolation-punctuation punctuation">${</span>event<span class="token punctuation">.</span>target<span class="token punctuation">.</span>uri<span class="token interpolation-punctuation punctuation">}</span></span><span class="token template-punctuation string">`</span></span><span class="token punctuation">)</span><span class="token punctuation">;</span>
<span class="token punctuation">}</span><span class="token punctuation">)</span><span class="token punctuation">;</span>

<span class="token comment">// Later, stop watching:</span>
subscription<span class="token punctuation">.</span><span class="token function">remove</span><span class="token punctuation">(</span><span class="token punctuation">)</span><span class="token punctuation">;</span>
</code></div></pre></div></div></div></div><div class="overflow-hidden rounded-lg border border-palette-gray4 [&amp;_h2]:mt-0 [&amp;_h3]:mt-0 [&amp;_h3]:mb-1.5 [&amp;_h4]:mb-0 [&amp;_li]:mb-0 class="text-xs! leading-none! font-normal whitespace-nowrap">tvOS</span></div></span></div></div><div class="px-4 [table_&amp;]:mb-0! [table_&amp;]:px-0"><p class="text-inherit font-normal text-[14px] leading-[1.5715] tracking-[-0.006rem] mb-2.5 [table_&amp;]:last:mb-0" data-text="true">Represents a download task with pause/resume support and progress tracking.</p>
<p class="text-inherit font-normal text-[14px] leading-[1.5715] tracking-[-0.006rem] mb-2.5 [table_&amp;]:last:mb-0" data-text="true">Download tasks start in the <code class="text-inherit text-xs leading-[130%] font-normal inline-block rounded-md border border-secondary bg-subtle px-1 inline! py-0 wrap-break-word" data-text="true">idle</code> state. Calling <code class="text-inherit text-xs leading-[130%] font-normal inline-block rounded-md border border-secondary bg-subtle px-1 inline! py-0 wrap-break-word" data-text="true">downloadAsync()</code> moves the task to <code class="text-inherit text-xs leading-[130%] font-normal inline-block rounded-md border border-secondary bg-subtle px-1 inline! py-0 wrap-break-word" data-text="true">active</code>;
pausing moves it to <code class="text-inherit text-xs leading-[130%] font-normal inline-block rounded-md border border-secondary bg-subtle px-1 inline! py-0 wrap-break-word" data-text="true">paused</code>, and a completed, cancelled, or failed transfer moves it to the
corresponding terminal state.</p></div><p class="tracking-[-0.006rem] flex border-y border-palette-gray4 bg-subtle px-4 py-2 text-xs font-medium text-tertiary" data-text="true"><span class="tracking-[-0.006rem] flex flex-row items-center gap-2 text-xs font-medium text-tertiary" data-text="true">DownloadTask Properties</span></p><div><div class="border-t border-palette-gray4 first:border-t-0"><div class="mb-2.5 flex flex-wrap justify-between px-4 pt-3 max-md:flex-col max-md:gap-y-1.5 [&amp;_h3]:mb-0!"><h3 class="text-inherit text-[20px] leading-normal font-semibold tracking-[-0.017rem] mt-7 mb-3 [&amp;_code]:text-[90%] max-md:text-[18px] max-md:leading-[1.5555] max-sm:text-[16px] max-sm:leading-relaxed group flex gap-1 scroll-m-8" data-heading="true" Only <code class="text-inherit text-xs leading-[130%] font-normal inline-block rounded-md border border-secondary bg-subtle px-1 inline! py-0 wrap-break-word" data-text="true">&#x27;progress&#x27;</code> is supported.</p></div></td></tr><tr class="even:bg-subtle"><td class="border-r border-secondary p-4 text-left last:border-r-0"><span class="leading-[1.6154] text-inherit font-medium" data-text="true" data-md="api-param-name">listener</span></td><td class="border-r border-secondary p-4 text-left last:border-r-0"><code class="text-inherit text-xs leading-[130%] font-normal inline-block rounded-md border border-secondary bg-subtle px-1 py-0.5 [&amp;&gt;span]:text-inherit!" data-text="true"><span class="text-quaternary">(</span><span>data<span class="text-quaternary">:</span> <a href="#downloadprogress" class="cursor-pointer decoration-0 hocus:opacity-80 font-normal text-link visited:text-link hocus:underline [&amp;_code]:hocus:underline [&amp;_b]:text-link [&amp;_code]:text-link [&amp;_em]:text-link [&amp;_i]:text-link [&amp;_span]:text-link [&amp;_strong]:text-link">DownloadProgress</a></span><span class="text-quaternary">) =&gt;</span> <!-- -->void</code></td><td class="border-r border-secondary p-4 text-left last:border-r-0 [&amp;&gt;*]:last:mb-0!"><div class="px-4 [table_&amp;]:mb-0! <blockquote class="flex rounded-md border border-default bg-subtle gap-2 px-3 py-2.5 [&amp;_code]:bg-element [&amp;_p]:mb-0! shadow-none mb-2.5 [table_&amp;]:last:mb-0" data-md="callout"><svg fill="none" viewBox="0 0 24 24" stroke="currentColor" class="translate-z shrink-0 select-none mt-0.75 icon-xs text-icon-default" role="img" aria-hidden="true"><g id="info-circle-duotone-icon"><path id="Fill" fill="currentColor" d="M12 22C17.5228 22 22 17.5228 22 12C22 6.47715 17.5228 2 12 2C6.47715 2 2 6.47715 2 12C2 17.5228 6.47715 22 12 22Z" opacity="0.12"></path><path id="Icon" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" stroke-width="2" d="M12 16V12M12 8H12.01M22 12C22 17.5228 17.5228 22 12 22C6.47715 22 2 17.5228 2 12C2 6.47715 6.47715 2 12 2C17.5228 2 22 6.47715 22 12Z"></path></g></svg><div class="w-full text-default last:mb-0 text-sm [&amp;_code]:text-[90%] [&amp;_p]:text-sm">

[table_&amp;]:px-0"><p class="text-inherit font-normal text-[14px] leading-[1.5715] tracking-[-0.006rem] mb-2.5 [table_&amp;]:last:mb-0" data-text="true">Cancels the download operation.</p>
<p class="text-inherit font-normal text-[14px] leading-[1.5715] tracking-[-0.006rem] mb-2.5 [table_&amp;]:last:mb-0" data-text="true">If <code class="text-inherit text-xs leading-[130%] font-normal inline-block rounded-md border border-secondary bg-subtle px-1 inline! py-0 wrap-break-word" data-text="true">downloadAsync()</code> or <code class="text-inherit text-xs leading-[130%] font-normal inline-block rounded-md border border-secondary bg-subtle px-1 inline! py-0 wrap-break-word" data-text="true">resumeAsync()</code> is pending, its promise is rejected after the native
request is cancelled. Calling this method after the task reaches <code class="text-inherit text-xs leading-[130%] font-normal inline-block rounded-md border border-secondary bg-subtle px-1 inline! py-0 wrap-break-word" data-text="true">completed</code>, <code class="text-inherit text-xs leading-[130%] font-normal inline-block rounded-md border border-secondary bg-subtle px-1 inline! py-0 wrap-break-word" data-text="true">cancelled</code>, or
<code class="text-inherit text-xs leading-[130%] font-normal inline-block rounded-md border border-secondary bg-subtle px-1 inline! py-0 wrap-break-word" data-text="true">error</code> has no effect.</p><div data-md="api-returns" class="flex flex-row items-start gap-2 mb-2.5 [table_&amp;]:last:mb-0"><div class="flex flex-row items-center gap-2"><svg fill="none" viewBox="0 0 24 24" [table_&amp;]:px-0"><p class="text-inherit font-normal text-[14px] leading-[1.5715] tracking-[-0.006rem] mb-2.5 [table_&amp;]:last:mb-0" data-text="true">Starts the download operation.</p>
<p class="text-inherit font-normal text-[14px] leading-[1.5715] tracking-[-0.006rem] mb-2.5 [table_&amp;]:last:mb-0" data-text="true">This method can only be called once, while the task is <code class="text-inherit text-xs leading-[130%] font-normal inline-block rounded-md border border-secondary bg-subtle px-1 inline! py-0 wrap-break-word" data-text="true">idle</code>. The promise resolves with
the downloaded file when the transfer completes, or with <code class="text-inherit text-xs leading-[130%] font-normal inline-block rounded-md border border-secondary bg-subtle px-1 inline! py-0 wrap-break-word" data-text="true">null</code> if the task is paused before
completion. It is rejected when the request fails or the task is cancelled.</p>
<p class="text-inherit font-normal text-[14px] leading-[1.5715] tracking-[-0.006rem] mb-2.5 [table_&amp;]:last:mb-0" data-text="true">If <code class="text-inherit text-xs leading-[130%] font-normal inline-block rounded-md border border-secondary bg-subtle px-1 inline! py-0 wrap-break-word" data-text="true">options.signal</code> is aborted, the promise is rejected with an <code class="text-inherit text-xs leading-[130%] font-normal inline-block rounded-md border border-secondary bg-subtle px-1 inline! py-0 wrap-break-word" data-text="true">AbortError</code>.</p><div data-md="api-returns" class="flex flex-row items-start gap-2"><div class="flex flex-row items-center gap-2"><svg fill="none" viewBox="0 0 24 24" stroke="currentColor" class="translate-z shrink-0 relative -mt-0.5 inline-block icon-sm text-icon-tertiary" role="img" aria-hidden="true"><g id="corner-down-right-outline-icon"><path id="Icon" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" the downloaded file, or <code class="text-inherit text-xs leading-[130%] font-normal inline-block rounded-md border border-secondary bg-subtle px-1 inline! py-0 wrap-break-word" data-text="true">null</code> when the task is paused.</p></div></div></div></div><div class="border-b border-palette-gray4 last:border-b-0"><div class="mb-2.5 flex flex-wrap justify-between px-4 pt-3 last:border-r-0 [&amp;&gt;*]:last:mb-0!"><div class="px-4 [table_&amp;]:mb-0! [table_&amp;]:px-0"><p class="text-inherit font-normal text-[14px] leading-[1.5715] tracking-[-0.006rem] mb-2.5 [table_&amp;]:last:mb-0" data-text="true">The saved pause state.</p></div></td></tr><tr class="even:bg-subtle"><td class="border-r border-secondary p-4 text-left last:border-r-0"><span class="leading-[1.6154] text-inherit font-medium" data-text="true" data-md="api-param-name">options</span><span class="flex text-xs! text-tertiary">(optional)</span></td><td class="border-r border-secondary p-4 text-left last:border-r-0"><code class="text-inherit text-xs leading-[130%] font-normal inline-block rounded-md border border-secondary bg-subtle px-1 py-0.5 [&amp;&gt;span]:text-inherit!" data-text="true"><a href="#downloadtaskoptions" class="cursor-pointer decoration-0 hocus:opacity-80 font-normal text-link visited:text-link hocus:underline [&amp;_code]:hocus:underline [&amp;_b]:text-link [&amp;_code]:text-link [&amp;_em]:text-link [&amp;_i]:text-link [&amp;_span]:text-link [&amp;_strong]:text-link">DownloadTaskOptions</a></code></td><td class="border-r border-secondary p-4 text-left last:border-r-0 [&amp;&gt;*]:last:mb-0!"><div class="px-4 [table_&amp;]:mb-0! [table_&amp;]:px-0"><p class="text-inherit font-normal text-[14px] leading-[1.5715] tracking-[-0.006rem] mb-2.5 [table_&amp;]:last:mb-0" data-text="true">Optional download task options to attach to the restored task.</p></div></td></tr></tbody></table></div><br/><div class="px-4 [table_&amp;]:mb-0! [table_&amp;]:px-0"><p class="text-inherit font-normal text-[14px] leading-[1.5715] tracking-[-0.006rem] mb-2.5 [table_&amp;]:last:mb-0" data-text="true">Creates a paused download task from saved state.</p>
<p class="text-inherit font-normal text-[14px] leading-[1.5715] tracking-[-0.006rem] mb-2.5 [table_&amp;]:last:mb-0" data-text="true">Use this to continue a download after persisting the value returned by <code class="text-inherit text-xs leading-[130%] font-normal inline-block rounded-md border border-secondary bg-subtle px-1 inline! py-0 wrap-break-word" data-text="true">savable()</code>. New options
can attach progress callbacks or an abort signal because functions and signals are not stored
in <code class="text-inherit text-xs leading-[130%] font-normal inline-block rounded-md border border-secondary bg-subtle px-1 inline! py-0 wrap-break-word" data-text="true">DownloadPauseState</code>. If both saved state and new options include headers, the new headers
override saved headers with the same names.</p><div data-md="api-returns" class="flex flex-row items-start gap-2"><div class="flex flex-row items-center gap-2"><svg fill="none" viewBox="0 0 24 24" [table_&amp;]:px-0"><p class="text-inherit font-normal text-[14px] leading-[1.5715] tracking-[-0.006rem] mb-2.5 [table_&amp;]:last:mb-0" data-text="true">Requests pausing the active download operation.</p>
<p class="text-inherit font-normal text-[14px] leading-[1.5715] tracking-[-0.006rem] mb-2.5 [table_&amp;]:last:mb-0" data-text="true">The pending <code class="text-inherit text-xs leading-[130%] font-normal inline-block rounded-md border border-secondary bg-subtle px-1 inline! py-0 wrap-break-word" data-text="true">downloadAsync()</code> or <code class="text-inherit text-xs leading-[130%] font-normal inline-block rounded-md border border-secondary bg-subtle px-1 inline! py-0 wrap-break-word" data-text="true">resumeAsync()</code> promise resolves with <code class="text-inherit text-xs leading-[130%] font-normal inline-block rounded-md border border-secondary bg-subtle px-1 inline! py-0 wrap-break-word" data-text="true">null</code> after native
code produces resume data and the task enters the <code class="text-inherit text-xs leading-[130%] font-normal inline-block rounded-md border border-secondary bg-subtle px-1 inline! py-0 wrap-break-word" data-text="true">paused</code> state. Use <code class="text-inherit text-xs leading-[130%] font-normal inline-block rounded-md border border-secondary bg-subtle px-1 inline! py-0 wrap-break-word" data-text="true">pauseAsync()</code> if you
need to wait until the task is ready to resume or save.</p><div data-md="api-returns" class="flex flex-row items-start gap-2 mb-2.5 [table_&amp;]:last:mb-0"><div class="flex flex-row items-center [table_&amp;]:px-0"><p class="text-inherit font-normal text-[14px] leading-[1.5715] tracking-[-0.006rem] mb-2.5 [table_&amp;]:last:mb-0" data-text="true">Resumes a paused download operation.</p>
<p class="text-inherit font-normal text-[14px] leading-[1.5715] tracking-[-0.006rem] mb-2.5 [table_&amp;]:last:mb-0" data-text="true">The promise resolves with the downloaded file when the transfer completes, or with <code class="text-inherit text-xs leading-[130%] font-normal inline-block rounded-md border border-secondary bg-subtle px-1 inline! py-0 wrap-break-word" data-text="true">null</code>
if the task is paused again before completion. It is rejected when the request fails or the task
is cancelled.</p><div data-md="api-returns" class="flex flex-row items-start gap-2"><div class="flex flex-row items-center gap-2"><svg fill="none" viewBox="0 0 24 24" stroke="currentColor" class="translate-z shrink-0 relative -mt-0.5 inline-block icon-sm text-icon-tertiary" role="img" aria-hidden="true"><g id="corner-down-right-outline-icon"><path id="Icon" stroke-linecap="round" 10"></path></g></svg><span class="text-sm font-medium text-tertiary">Returns:</span></div><code class="text-inherit text-xs leading-[130%] font-normal inline-block rounded-md border border-secondary [table_&amp;]:px-0"><p class="text-inherit font-normal text-[14px] leading-[1.5715] tracking-[-0.006rem] mb-2.5 [table_&amp;]:last:mb-0" data-text="true">Returns the paused task state that can be persisted and restored later.</p>
<p class="text-inherit font-normal text-[14px] leading-[1.5715] tracking-[-0.006rem] mb-2.5 [table_&amp;]:last:mb-0" data-text="true">This method can only be called while the task is <code class="text-inherit text-xs leading-[130%] font-normal inline-block rounded-md border border-secondary bg-subtle px-1 inline! py-0 wrap-break-word" data-text="true">paused</code>. The returned state contains
platform-specific resume data and request metadata, but does not include callbacks or abort
signals.</p><div data-md="api-returns" class="flex flex-row items-start gap-2"><div class="flex flex-row items-center gap-2"><svg fill="none" viewBox="0 0 24 24" stroke="currentColor" class="translate-z shrink-0 relative -mt-0.5 inline-block icon-sm text-icon-tertiary" role="img" aria-hidden="true"><g id="corner-down-right-outline-icon"><path id="Icon" stroke-linecap="round" 10"></path></g></svg><span class="text-sm font-medium text-tertiary">Returns:</span></div><code class="text-inherit text-xs leading-[130%] font-normal inline-block rounded-md border border-secondary [&amp;_strong]:text-link">DownloadPauseState</a></code></div><div class="mt-1.5 mb-1 flex flex-col pl-6"><div class=""><p class="text-inherit font-normal text-[14px] leading-[1.5715] data-text="true"><span class="font-medium">Type: </span><span>Class</span><span> extends </span><code class="text-inherit text-xs leading-[130%] font-normal inline-block rounded-md border border-secondary bg-subtle px-1 py-0.5" data-text="true">FileSystemFile</code><span> implements </span><code class="text-inherit text-xs leading-[130%] font-normal inline-block rounded-md border border-secondary bg-subtle px-1 py-0.5" data-text="true"><a target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer" class="cursor-pointer decoration-0 hocus:opacity-80 font-normal text-link visited:text-link hocus:underline [&amp;_code]:hocus:underline [&amp;_b]:text-link [&amp;_code]:text-link [&amp;_em]:text-link [&amp;_i]:text-link [&amp;_span]:text-link [&amp;_strong]:text-link" href="https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/API/Blob">Blob</a></code></p><div class="px-4 [table_&amp;]:mb-0! [table_&amp;]:px-0"><p class="text-inherit font-normal text-[14px] leading-[1.5715] tracking-[-0.006rem] mb-2.5 [table_&amp;]:last:mb-0" data-text="true">Represents a file on the filesystem.</p>
<p class="text-inherit font-normal text-[14px] leading-[1.5715] tracking-[-0.006rem] mb-2.5 [table_&amp;]:last:mb-0" data-text="true">A <code class="text-inherit text-xs leading-[130%] font-normal inline-block rounded-md border border-secondary bg-subtle px-1 inline! py-0 wrap-break-word" data-text="true">File</code> instance can be created for any path, and does not need to exist on the filesystem during creation.</p>
<p class="text-inherit font-normal text-[14px] leading-[1.5715] tracking-[-0.006rem] mb-2.5 [table_&amp;]:last:mb-0" data-text="true">The constructor accepts an array of strings that are joined to create the file URI. The first argument can also be a <code class="text-inherit text-xs leading-[130%] font-normal inline-block rounded-md border border-secondary bg-subtle px-1 inline! py-0 wrap-break-word" data-text="true">Directory</code> instance (like <code class="text-inherit text-xs leading-[130%] font-normal inline-block rounded-md border border-secondary bg-subtle px-1 inline! py-0 wrap-break-word" data-text="true">Paths.cache</code>) or a <code class="text-inherit text-xs leading-[130%] font-normal inline-block rounded-md border border-secondary bg-subtle px-1 inline! py-0 wrap-break-word" data-text="true">File</code> instance (which creates a new reference to the same file).</p><div class="mb-2.5 [table_&amp;]:last:mb-0 [&amp;&gt;*:last-child]:mb-0!"><p class="tracking-[-0.006rem] flex border-y border-palette-gray4 bg-subtle px-4 py-2 text-xs font-medium text-tertiary -mx-4 mt-1 mb-3" data-text="true"><span class="tracking-[-0.006rem] flex flex-row items-center gap-2 text-xs font-medium text-tertiary" data-text="true"><svg fill="none" viewBox="0 0 24 24" stroke="currentColor" class="translate-z shrink-0 icon-sm text-icon-secondary" role="img" </code></div></pre></div></div><p class="tracking-[-0.006rem] flex border-y border-palette-gray4 bg-subtle px-4 py-2 text-xs font-medium text-tertiary" data-text="true"><span [table_&amp;]:px-0"><p class="text-inherit font-normal text-[14px] leading-[1.5715] tracking-[-0.006rem] mb-2.5 [table_&amp;]:last:mb-0" data-text="true">A creation time of the file expressed in milliseconds since the epoch. Returns a <code class="text-inherit text-xs leading-[130%] font-normal inline-block rounded-md border border-secondary bg-subtle px-1 inline! py-0 wrap-break-word" data-text="true">null</code> if the file does not exist, cannot be read or the Android version is earlier than API 26.</p></div><p class="tracking-[-0.006rem] text-sm font-medium text-tertiary mx-4 mb-2.5 [table_&amp;]:last:mb-0"
