[table_&amp;]:px-0"><p class="text-inherit font-normal text-[14px] leading-[1.5715] tracking-[-0.006rem] mb-2.5 [table_&amp;]:last:mb-0" data-text="true">A boolean representing if a file exists. <code class="text-inherit text-xs leading-[130%] font-normal inline-block rounded-md border border-secondary bg-subtle px-1 inline! py-0 wrap-break-word" data-text="true">true</code> if the file exists, <code class="text-inherit text-xs leading-[130%] font-normal inline-block rounded-md border border-secondary bg-subtle px-1 inline! py-0 wrap-break-word" data-text="true">false</code> otherwise.
Also, <code class="text-inherit text-xs leading-[130%] font-normal inline-block rounded-md border border-secondary bg-subtle px-1 inline! py-0 wrap-break-word" data-text="true">false</code> if the application does not have read access to the file.</p></div></div><div class="border-t border-palette-gray4 first:border-t-0"><div class="mb-2.5 flex flex-wrap justify-between px-4 pt-3 [table_&amp;]:px-0"><p class="text-inherit font-normal text-[14px] leading-[1.5715] tracking-[-0.006rem] mb-2.5 [table_&amp;]:last:mb-0" data-text="true">Creates a download task without starting it.</p>
<p class="text-inherit font-normal text-[14px] leading-[1.5715] tracking-[-0.006rem] mb-2.5 [table_&amp;]:last:mb-0" data-text="true">Call <code class="text-inherit text-xs leading-[130%] font-normal inline-block rounded-md border border-secondary bg-subtle px-1 inline! py-0 wrap-break-word" data-text="true">downloadAsync()</code> on the returned task to start the download. Use this when you need
pause/resume support, task state, cancellation, or manual progress subscriptions.</p><div data-md="api-returns" class="flex flex-row items-start gap-2"><div class="flex flex-row items-center gap-2"><svg fill="none" viewBox="0 0 24 24" stroke="currentColor" class="translate-z shrink-0 relative -mt-0.5 inline-block icon-sm text-icon-tertiary" role="img" aria-hidden="true"><g id="corner-down-right-outline-icon"><path id="Icon" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" stroke-width="2" d="M4 4V5.4C4 8.76031 4 10.4405 4.65396 11.7239C5.2292 12.8529 6.14708 13.7708 7.27606 14.346C8.55953 15 10.2397 15 13.6 15H20M15 20L20 15L15 10"></path></g></svg><span class="text-sm font-medium text-tertiary">Returns:</span></div><code class="text-inherit text-xs leading-[130%] font-normal inline-block rounded-md border border-secondary bg-subtle px-1 py-0.5 [&amp;&gt;span]:text-inherit!" data-text="true"><a href="#downloadtask" class="cursor-pointer decoration-0 hocus:opacity-80 font-normal text-link visited:text-link hocus:underline [&amp;_code]:hocus:underline [&amp;_b]:text-link [&amp;_code]:text-link [&amp;_em]:text-link [&amp;_i]:text-link [&amp;_span]:text-link [&amp;_strong]:text-link">DownloadTask</a></code></div><div class="mt-1.5 mb-1 flex flex-col pl-6"><div class=""><p class="text-inherit font-normal text-[14px] leading-[1.5715] tracking-[-0.006rem] mb-2.5 [table_&amp;]:last:mb-0" data-text="true">A download task that can be started with <code class="text-inherit text-xs leading-[130%] font-normal inline-block rounded-md border border-secondary bg-subtle px-1 inline! py-0 wrap-break-word" data-text="true">downloadAsync()</code>.</p></div></div><div class="mb-2.5 [table_&amp;]:last:mb-0 [&amp;&gt;*:last-child]:mb-0!"><p class="tracking-[-0.006rem] flex border-y border-palette-gray4 bg-subtle px-4 py-2 text-xs font-medium text-tertiary -mx-4 mt-1 mb-3" data-text="true"><span class="tracking-[-0.006rem] flex flex-row items-center gap-2 text-xs font-medium text-tertiary" data-text="true"><svg fill="none" viewBox="0 0 24 24" stroke="currentColor" class="translate-z shrink-0 icon-sm text-icon-secondary" role="img" aria-hidden="true"><g id="code-square-01-outline-icon"><path id="Icon" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" stroke-width="2" d="M14.5 15L17.5 12L14.5 9M9.5 9L6.5 12L9.5 15M7.8 21H16.2C17.8802 21 18.7202 21 19.362 20.673C19.9265 20.3854 20.3854 19.9265 20.673 19.362C21 18.7202 21 17.8802 21 16.2V7.8C21 6.11984 21 5.27976 20.673 4.63803C20.3854 4.07354 19.9265 3.6146 19.362 3.32698C18.7202 3 17.8802 3 16.2 3H7.8C6.11984 3 5.27976 3 4.63803 3.32698C4.07354 3.6146 3.6146 4.07354 3.32698 4.63803C3 5.27976 3 6.11984 3 7.8V16.2C3 17.8802 3 18.7202 3.32698 19.362C3.6146 19.9265 4.07354 20.3854 4.63803 20.673C5.27976 21 6.11984 21 7.8 21Z"></path></g></svg>Example</span></p><pre data-md-lang="ts" class="relative my-4 overflow-x-auto rounded-md border border-secondary bg-subtle whitespace-pre [p+&amp;]:mt-0" data-text="true"><div class="w-fit p-4"><code class="text-xs text-default"><span class="token keyword">const</span> destination <span class="token operator">=</span> <span class="token keyword">new</span> <span class="token class-name">File</span><span class="token punctuation">(</span>Paths<span class="token punctuation">.</span>document<span class="token punctuation">,</span> <span class="token string">'video.mp4'</span><span class="token punctuation">)</span><span class="token punctuation">;</span>
<span class="token keyword">const</span> task <span class="token operator">=</span> File<span class="token punctuation">.</span><span class="token function">createDownloadTask</span><span class="token punctuation">(</span><span class="token string">'https://example.com/video.mp4'</span><span class="token punctuation">,</span> destination<span class="token punctuation">,</span> <span class="token punctuation">{</span>
  <span class="token function-variable function">onProgress</span><span class="token operator">:</span> <span class="token punctuation">(</span><span class="token punctuation">{</span> bytesWritten<span class="token punctuation">,</span> totalBytes <span class="token punctuation">}</span><span class="token punctuation">)</span> <span class="token operator">=></span> <span class="token punctuation">{</span>
    <span class="token builtin">console</span><span class="token punctuation">.</span><span class="token function">log</span><span class="token punctuation">(</span><span class="token template-string"><span class="token template-punctuation string">`</span><span class="token interpolation"><span class="token interpolation-punctuation punctuation">${</span>bytesWritten<span class="token interpolation-punctuation punctuation">}</span></span><span class="token string"> / </span><span class="token interpolation"><span class="token interpolation-punctuation punctuation">${</span>totalBytes<span class="token interpolation-punctuation punctuation">}</span></span><span class="token template-punctuation string">`</span></span><span class="token punctuation">)</span><span class="token punctuation">;</span>
  <span class="token punctuation">}</span><span class="token punctuation">,</span>
<span class="token punctuation">}</span><span class="token punctuation">)</span><span class="token punctuation">;</span>

<span class="token keyword">const</span> file <span class="token operator">=</span> <span class="token keyword">await</span> task<span class="token punctuation">.</span><span class="token function">downloadAsync</span><span class="token punctuation">(</span><span class="token punctuation">)</span><span class="token punctuation">;</span>
</code></div></pre></div></div></div><div class="border-b border-palette-gray4 last:border-b-0"><div class="mb-2.5 flex flex-wrap justify-between px-4 pt-3 max-md:flex-col max-md:gap-y-1.5 [table_&amp;]:px-0"><p class="text-inherit font-normal text-[14px] leading-[1.5715] tracking-[-0.006rem] mb-2.5 [table_&amp;]:last:mb-0" data-text="true">Creates an upload task for this file without starting it.</p>
<p class="text-inherit font-normal text-[14px] leading-[1.5715] tracking-[-0.006rem] mb-2.5 [table_&amp;]:last:mb-0" data-text="true">Call <code class="text-inherit text-xs leading-[130%] font-normal inline-block rounded-md border border-secondary bg-subtle px-1 inline! py-0 wrap-break-word" data-text="true">uploadAsync()</code> on the returned task to start the upload. Use this when you need to
inspect task state, cancel the upload, or subscribe to progress manually.</p><div data-md="api-returns" class="flex flex-row items-start gap-2"><div class="flex flex-row items-center gap-2"><svg fill="none" viewBox="0 0 24 24" stroke="currentColor" class="translate-z shrink-0 relative -mt-0.5 inline-block icon-sm text-icon-tertiary" role="img" aria-hidden="true"><g id="corner-down-right-outline-icon"><path id="Icon" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" stroke-width="2" d="M4 4V5.4C4 8.76031 4 10.4405 4.65396 11.7239C5.2292 12.8529 6.14708 13.7708 7.27606 14.346C8.55953 15 10.2397 15 13.6 15H20M15 20L20 15L15 10"></path></g></svg><span class="text-sm font-medium text-tertiary">Returns:</span></div><code class="text-inherit text-xs leading-[130%] font-normal inline-block rounded-md border border-secondary bg-subtle px-1 py-0.5 [&amp;&gt;span]:text-inherit!" data-text="true"><a href="#uploadtask" class="cursor-pointer decoration-0 hocus:opacity-80 font-normal text-link visited:text-link hocus:underline [&amp;_code]:hocus:underline [&amp;_b]:text-link [&amp;_code]:text-link [&amp;_em]:text-link [&amp;_i]:text-link [&amp;_span]:text-link [&amp;_strong]:text-link">UploadTask</a></code></div><div class="mt-1.5 mb-1 flex flex-col pl-6"><div class=""><p class="text-inherit font-normal text-[14px] leading-[1.5715] tracking-[-0.006rem] mb-2.5 [table_&amp;]:last:mb-0" data-text="true">An upload task that can be started with <code class="text-inherit text-xs leading-[130%] font-normal inline-block rounded-md border border-secondary bg-subtle px-1 inline! py-0 wrap-break-word" data-text="true">uploadAsync()</code>.</p></div></div><div class="mb-2.5 [table_&amp;]:last:mb-0 [&amp;&gt;*:last-child]:mb-0!"><p class="tracking-[-0.006rem] flex border-y border-palette-gray4 bg-subtle px-4 py-2 text-xs font-medium text-tertiary -mx-4 mt-1 mb-3" data-text="true"><span class="tracking-[-0.006rem] flex flex-row items-center gap-2 text-xs font-medium text-tertiary" data-text="true"><svg fill="none" viewBox="0 0 24 24" stroke="currentColor" class="translate-z shrink-0 icon-sm text-icon-secondary" role="img" aria-hidden="true"><g id="code-square-01-outline-icon"><path id="Icon" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" stroke-width="2" d="M14.5 15L17.5 12L14.5 9M9.5 9L6.5 12L9.5 15M7.8 21H16.2C17.8802 21 18.7202 21 19.362 20.673C19.9265 20.3854 20.3854 19.9265 20.673 19.362C21 18.7202 21 17.8802 21 16.2V7.8C21 6.11984 21 5.27976 20.673 4.63803C20.3854 4.07354 19.9265 3.6146 19.362 3.32698C18.7202 3 17.8802 3 16.2 3H7.8C6.11984 3 5.27976 3 4.63803 3.32698C4.07354 3.6146 3.6146 4.07354 3.32698 4.63803C3 5.27976 3 6.11984 3 7.8V16.2C3 17.8802 3 18.7202 3.32698 19.362C3.6146 19.9265 4.07354 20.3854 4.63803 20.673C5.27976 21 6.11984 21 7.8 21Z"></path></g></svg>Example</span></p><pre data-md-lang="ts" class="relative my-4 overflow-x-auto rounded-md border border-secondary bg-subtle whitespace-pre [p+&amp;]:mt-0" data-text="true"><div class="w-fit p-4"><code class="text-xs text-default"><span class="token keyword">const</span> file <span class="token operator">=</span> <span class="token keyword">new</span> <span class="token class-name">File</span><span class="token punctuation">(</span>Paths<span class="token punctuation">.</span>document<span class="token punctuation">,</span> <span class="token string">'photo.jpg'</span><span class="token punctuation">)</span><span class="token punctuation">;</span>
<span class="token keyword">const</span> task <span class="token operator">=</span> file<span class="token punctuation">.</span><span class="token function">createUploadTask</span><span class="token punctuation">(</span><span class="token string">'https://example.com/upload'</span><span class="token punctuation">,</span> <span class="token punctuation">{</span>
  uploadType<span class="token operator">:</span> UploadType<span class="token punctuation">.</span><span class="token constant">MULTIPART</span><span class="token punctuation">,</span>
  <span class="token function-variable function">onProgress</span><span class="token operator">:</span> <span class="token punctuation">(</span><span class="token punctuation">{</span> bytesSent<span class="token punctuation">,</span> totalBytes <span class="token punctuation">}</span><span class="token punctuation">)</span> <span class="token operator">=></span> <span class="token punctuation">{</span>
    <span class="token builtin">console</span><span class="token punctuation">.</span><span class="token function">log</span><span class="token punctuation">(</span><span class="token template-string"><span class="token template-punctuation string">`</span><span class="token interpolation"><span class="token interpolation-punctuation punctuation">${</span>bytesSent<span class="token interpolation-punctuation punctuation">}</span></span><span class="token string"> / </span><span class="token interpolation"><span class="token interpolation-punctuation punctuation">${</span>totalBytes<span class="token interpolation-punctuation punctuation">}</span></span><span class="token template-punctuation string">`</span></span><span class="token punctuation">)</span><span class="token punctuation">;</span>
  <span class="token punctuation">}</span><span class="token punctuation">,</span>
<span class="token punctuation">}</span><span class="token punctuation">)</span><span class="token punctuation">;</span>

<span class="token keyword">const</span> result <span class="token operator">=</span> <span class="token keyword">await</span> task<span class="token punctuation">.</span><span class="token function">uploadAsync</span><span class="token punctuation">(</span><span class="token punctuation">)</span><span class="token punctuation">;</span>
</code></div></pre></div></div></div><div class="border-b border-palette-gray4 last:border-b-0"><div class="mb-2.5 flex flex-wrap justify-between px-4 pt-3 max-md:flex-col max-md:gap-y-1.5 [&amp;_code]:hocus:underline [&amp;_b]:text-link [&amp;_code]:text-link [&amp;_em]:text-link [&amp;_i]:text-link [&amp;_span]:text-link [&amp;_strong]:text-link">FileMode</a></code></td><td class="border-r border-secondary p-4 text-left last:border-r-0 [&amp;&gt;*]:last:mb-0!"><div class="px-4 [table_&amp;]:mb-0! [table_&amp;]:px-0"><p class="text-inherit font-normal text-[14px] leading-[1.5715] tracking-[-0.006rem] mb-2.5 [table_&amp;]:last:mb-0" data-text="true">The <a href="#filemode" class="cursor-pointer decoration-0 hocus:opacity-80 font-normal text-link visited:text-link hocus:underline [&amp;_code]:hocus:underline [&amp;_b]:text-link [&amp;_code]:text-link [&amp;_em]:text-link [&amp;_i]:text-link [&amp;_span]:text-link [&amp;_strong]:text-link"><code class="text-inherit text-xs leading-[130%] font-normal inline-block rounded-md border border-secondary bg-subtle px-1 inline! py-0 wrap-break-word" data-text="true">FileMode</code></a> to use.</p>
<ul class="leading-[1.6154] text-inherit list-disc ml-6 [&amp;_ol]:mt-2 [&amp;_ol]:mb-4 [&amp;_ul]:mt-2 [&amp;_ul]:mb-4 mb-2.5 [table_&amp;]:last:mb-0">
<li class="text-inherit font-normal mb-2 text-sm" data-text="true">On <span class="leading-[1.6154] text-inherit font-semibold" data-text="true">Android</span>, SAF <code class="text-inherit text-xs leading-[130%] font-normal inline-block rounded-md border border-secondary bg-subtle px-1 inline! py-0 wrap-break-word" data-text="true">content://</code> URIs do not support <code class="text-inherit text-xs leading-[130%] font-normal inline-block rounded-md border border-secondary bg-subtle px-1 inline! py-0 wrap-break-word" data-text="true">ReadWrite</code> mode.</li>
<li class="text-inherit font-normal mb-2 text-sm" data-text="true"><span class="leading-[1.6154] text-inherit font-semibold" data-text="true">Defaults</span>:<!-- -->
<ul class="leading-[1.6154] text-inherit list-disc ml-6 [&amp;_ol]:mt-2 [&amp;_ol]:mb-4 [&amp;_ul]:mt-2 [&amp;_ul]:mb-4 mb-2.5 [table_&amp;]:last:mb-0">
<li class="text-inherit font-normal mb-2 text-sm" data-text="true">For SAF <code class="text-inherit text-xs leading-[130%] font-normal inline-block rounded-md border border-secondary bg-subtle px-1 inline! py-0 wrap-break-word" data-text="true">content://</code> URIs, the default is <code class="text-inherit text-xs leading-[130%] font-normal inline-block rounded-md border border-secondary bg-subtle px-1 inline! py-0 wrap-break-word" data-text="true">FileMode.ReadOnly</code>.</li>
<li class="text-inherit font-normal mb-2 text-sm" data-text="true">For standard <code class="text-inherit text-xs leading-[130%] font-normal inline-block rounded-md border border-secondary bg-subtle px-1 inline! py-0 wrap-break-word" data-text="true">file://</code> URIs, the default is <code class="text-inherit text-xs leading-[130%] font-normal inline-block rounded-md border border-secondary bg-subtle px-1 inline! py-0 wrap-break-word" data-text="true">FileMode.ReadWrite</code>.</li>
</ul>
</li>
</ul></div></td></tr></tbody></table></div><br/><div class="px-4 [table_&amp;]:mb-0! [table_&amp;]:px-0"><p class="text-inherit font-normal text-[14px] leading-[1.5715] tracking-[-0.006rem] mb-2.5 [table_&amp;]:last:mb-0" data-text="true">Returns A <code class="text-inherit text-xs leading-[130%] font-normal inline-block rounded-md border border-secondary bg-subtle px-1 inline! py-0 wrap-break-word" data-text="true">FileHandle</code> object that can be used to read and write data to the file.</p><div data-md="api-returns" class="flex flex-row items-start gap-2 mb-2.5 [table_&amp;]:last:mb-0"><div class="flex flex-row items-center gap-2"><svg fill="none" viewBox="0 0 24 [table_&amp;]:px-0"><p class="text-inherit font-normal text-[14px] leading-[1.5715] tracking-[-0.006rem] mb-2.5 [table_&amp;]:last:mb-0" data-text="true">A static method that opens a file picker to select a single file of specified type. On iOS, it returns a temporary copy of the file leaving the original file untouched.</p>
<p class="text-inherit font-normal text-[14px] leading-[1.5715] tracking-[-0.006rem] mb-2.5 [table_&amp;]:last:mb-0" data-text="true">Selecting multiple files is not supported yet.</p><div [table_&amp;]:px-0"><p class="text-inherit font-normal text-[14px] leading-[1.5715] tracking-[-0.006rem] mb-2.5 [table_&amp;]:last:mb-0" data-text="true">Uploads this file to a server and starts the request immediately.</p>
<p class="text-inherit font-normal text-[14px] leading-[1.5715] tracking-[-0.006rem] mb-2.5 [table_&amp;]:last:mb-0" data-text="true">The promise resolves with the HTTP response metadata and body for any completed response,
including non-2xx status codes. It is rejected only when the file cannot be read, the
request fails, or the upload is cancelled.</p><div data-md="api-returns" class="flex flex-row items-start gap-2"><div class="flex flex-row items-center gap-2"><svg fill="none" viewBox="0 0 24 24" [table_&amp;]:px-0"><p class="text-inherit font-normal text-[14px] leading-[1.5715] tracking-[-0.006rem] mb-2.5 [table_&amp;]:last:mb-0" data-text="true">Invoked when a change is detected. Receives a <code class="text-inherit text-xs leading-[130%] font-normal inline-block rounded-md border border-secondary bg-subtle px-1 inline! py-0 wrap-break-word" data-text="true">WatchEvent</code> describing what changed.</p></div></td></tr><tr class="even:bg-subtle"><td class="border-r border-secondary p-4 text-left last:border-r-0"><span class="leading-[1.6154] text-inherit font-medium" data-text="true" data-md="api-param-name">options</span><span class="flex text-xs! text-tertiary">(optional)</span></td><td class="border-r border-secondary p-4 text-left last:border-r-0"><code class="text-inherit text-xs leading-[130%] font-normal inline-block rounded-md border border-secondary bg-subtle px-1 py-0.5 [&amp;&gt;span]:text-inherit!" data-text="true"><a href="#watchoptions" class="cursor-pointer decoration-0 hocus:opacity-80 font-normal text-link visited:text-link hocus:underline [&amp;_code]:hocus:underline [&amp;_b]:text-link [&amp;_code]:text-link [&amp;_em]:text-link [&amp;_i]:text-link [&amp;_span]:text-link [&amp;_strong]:text-link">WatchOptions</a></code></td><td class="border-r border-secondary p-4 text-left last:border-r-0 [&amp;&gt;*]:last:mb-0!"><div class="px-4 [table_&amp;]:mb-0! [table_&amp;]:px-0"><p class="text-inherit font-normal text-[14px] leading-[1.5715] tracking-[-0.006rem] mb-2.5 [table_&amp;]:last:mb-0" data-text="true">Configuration for debouncing and filtering events.</p></div></td></tr></tbody></table></div><br/><div class="px-4 [table_&amp;]:mb-0! [table_&amp;]:px-0"><p class="text-inherit font-normal text-[14px] leading-[1.5715] tracking-[-0.006rem] mb-2.5 [table_&amp;]:last:mb-0" data-text="true">Watches this file for changes on the filesystem.</p>
<p class="text-inherit font-normal text-[14px] leading-[1.5715] tracking-[-0.006rem] mb-2.5 [table_&amp;]:last:mb-0" data-text="true">The watcher automatically stops when the file is deleted or renamed. To stop watching manually,
call <code class="text-inherit text-xs leading-[130%] font-normal inline-block rounded-md border border-secondary bg-subtle px-1 inline! py-0 wrap-break-word" data-text="true">remove()</code> on the returned subscription.</p><div data-md="api-returns" class="flex flex-row items-start gap-2"><div class="flex flex-row items-center gap-2"><svg fill="none" viewBox="0 0 24 24" stroke="currentColor" class="translate-z shrink-0 relative -mt-0.5 inline-block icon-sm text-icon-tertiary" role="img" aria-hidden="true"><g id="corner-down-right-outline-icon"><path id="Icon" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" stroke-width="2" d="M4 4V5.4C4 8.76031 4 10.4405 4.65396 11.7239C5.2292 12.8529 6.14708 13.7708 7.27606 14.346C8.55953 15 10.2397 15 13.6 15H20M15 20L20 15L15 10"></path></g></svg><span class="text-sm font-medium text-tertiary">Returns:</span></div><code class="text-inherit text-xs leading-[130%] font-normal inline-block rounded-md border border-secondary bg-subtle px-1 py-0.5 [&amp;&gt;span]:text-inherit!" data-text="true"><a href="#watchsubscription" class="cursor-pointer decoration-0 hocus:opacity-80 font-normal text-link visited:text-link hocus:underline [&amp;_code]:hocus:underline [&amp;_b]:text-link [&amp;_code]:text-link [&amp;_em]:text-link [&amp;_i]:text-link [&amp;_span]:text-link [&amp;_strong]:text-link">WatchSubscription</a></code></div><div class="mt-1.5 mb-1 flex flex-col pl-6"><div class=""><p class="text-inherit font-normal text-[14px] leading-[1.5715] tracking-[-0.006rem] mb-2.5 [table_&amp;]:last:mb-0" data-text="true">A subscription handle. Call <code class="text-inherit text-xs leading-[130%] font-normal inline-block rounded-md border border-secondary bg-subtle px-1 inline! py-0 wrap-break-word" data-text="true">remove()</code> to stop watching.</p></div></div><div class="mb-2.5 [table_&amp;]:last:mb-0 [&amp;&gt;*:last-child]:mb-0!"><p class="tracking-[-0.006rem] flex border-y border-palette-gray4 bg-subtle px-4 py-2 text-xs font-medium text-tertiary -mx-4 mt-1 mb-3" data-text="true"><span class="tracking-[-0.006rem] flex flex-row items-center gap-2 text-xs font-medium text-tertiary" data-text="true"><svg fill="none" 21Z"></path></g></svg>Example</span></p><pre data-md-lang="ts" class="relative my-4 overflow-x-auto rounded-md border border-secondary bg-subtle whitespace-pre [p+&amp;]:mt-0" data-text="true"><div class="w-fit p-4"><code class="text-xs text-default"><span class="token keyword">const</span> file <span class="token operator">=</span> <span class="token keyword">new</span> <span class="token class-name">File</span><span class="token punctuation">(</span>Paths<span class="token punctuation">.</span>cache<span class="token punctuation">,</span> <span class="token string">'data.json'</span><span class="token punctuation">)</span><span class="token punctuation">;</span>
<span class="token keyword">const</span> subscription <span class="token operator">=</span> file<span class="token punctuation">.</span><span class="token function">watch</span><span class="token punctuation">(</span><span class="token punctuation">(</span>event<span class="token punctuation">)</span> <span class="token operator">=></span> <span class="token punctuation">{</span>
  <span class="token builtin">console</span><span class="token punctuation">.</span><span class="token function">log</span><span class="token punctuation">(</span><span class="token template-string"><span class="token template-punctuation string">`</span><span class="token string">File </span><span class="token interpolation"><span class="token interpolation-punctuation punctuation">${</span>event<span class="token punctuation">.</span><span class="token keyword">type</span><span class="token interpolation-punctuation punctuation">}</span></span><span class="token template-punctuation string">`</span></span><span class="token punctuation">)</span><span class="token punctuation">;</span>
<span class="token punctuation">}</span><span class="token punctuation">)</span><span class="token punctuation">;</span>

<span class="token comment">// Later, stop watching:</span>
subscription<span class="token punctuation">.</span><span class="token function">remove</span><span class="token punctuation">(</span><span class="token punctuation">)</span><span class="token punctuation">;</span>
</code></div></pre></div></div></div><div class="border-b border-palette-gray4 last:border-b-0"><div class="mb-2.5 flex flex-wrap justify-between px-4 pt-3 max-md:flex-col max-md:gap-y-1.5 [table_&amp;]:px-0"><p class="text-inherit font-normal text-[14px] leading-[1.5715] tracking-[-0.006rem] mb-2.5 [table_&amp;]:last:mb-0" data-text="true">Represents an upload task with progress tracking and cancellation support.</p>
<p class="text-inherit font-normal text-[14px] leading-[1.5715] tracking-[-0.006rem] mb-2.5 [table_&amp;]:last:mb-0" data-text="true">Upload tasks start in the <code class="text-inherit text-xs leading-[130%] font-normal inline-block rounded-md border border-secondary bg-subtle px-1 inline! py-0 wrap-break-word" data-text="true">idle</code> state. Calling <code class="text-inherit text-xs leading-[130%] font-normal inline-block rounded-md border border-secondary bg-subtle px-1 inline! py-0 wrap-break-word" data-text="true">uploadAsync()</code> moves the task to <code class="text-inherit text-xs leading-[130%] font-normal inline-block rounded-md border border-secondary bg-subtle px-1 inline! py-0 wrap-break-word" data-text="true">active</code>,
then to <code class="text-inherit text-xs leading-[130%] font-normal inline-block rounded-md border border-secondary bg-subtle px-1 inline! py-0 wrap-break-word" data-text="true">completed</code>, <code class="text-inherit text-xs leading-[130%] font-normal inline-block rounded-md border border-secondary bg-subtle px-1 inline! py-0 wrap-break-word" data-text="true">cancelled</code>, or <code class="text-inherit text-xs leading-[130%] font-normal inline-block rounded-md border border-secondary bg-subtle px-1 inline! py-0 wrap-break-word" data-text="true">error</code>.</p></div><p class="tracking-[-0.006rem] flex border-y border-palette-gray4 bg-subtle px-4 py-2 text-xs font-medium text-tertiary" data-text="true"><span class="tracking-[-0.006rem] flex flex-row items-center gap-2 text-xs font-medium text-tertiary" data-text="true">UploadTask Properties</span></p><div><div class="border-t border-palette-gray4 first:border-t-0"><div class="mb-2.5 flex flex-wrap [table_&amp;]:px-0"><p class="text-inherit font-normal text-[14px] leading-[1.5715] tracking-[-0.006rem] mb-2.5 [table_&amp;]:last:mb-0" data-text="true">Cancels the upload operation.</p>
<p class="text-inherit font-normal text-[14px] leading-[1.5715] tracking-[-0.006rem] mb-2.5 [table_&amp;]:last:mb-0" data-text="true">If <code class="text-inherit text-xs leading-[130%] font-normal inline-block rounded-md border border-secondary bg-subtle px-1 inline! py-0 wrap-break-word" data-text="true">uploadAsync()</code> is pending, its promise is rejected after the native request is cancelled.
Calling this method after the task reaches <code class="text-inherit text-xs leading-[130%] font-normal inline-block rounded-md border border-secondary bg-subtle px-1 inline! py-0 wrap-break-word" data-text="true">completed</code>, <code class="text-inherit text-xs leading-[130%] font-normal inline-block rounded-md border border-secondary bg-subtle px-1 inline! py-0 wrap-break-word" data-text="true">cancelled</code>, or <code class="text-inherit text-xs leading-[130%] font-normal inline-block rounded-md border border-secondary bg-subtle px-1 inline! py-0 wrap-break-word" data-text="true">error</code> has no effect.</p><div data-md="api-returns" class="flex flex-row items-start gap-2 mb-2.5 [table_&amp;]:last:mb-0"><div class="flex flex-row items-center gap-2"><svg [table_&amp;]:px-0"><p class="text-inherit font-normal text-[14px] leading-[1.5715] tracking-[-0.006rem] mb-2.5 [table_&amp;]:last:mb-0" data-text="true">Starts the upload operation.</p>
<p class="text-inherit font-normal text-[14px] leading-[1.5715] tracking-[-0.006rem] mb-2.5 [table_&amp;]:last:mb-0" data-text="true">This method can only be called once, while the task is <code class="text-inherit text-xs leading-[130%] font-normal inline-block rounded-md border border-secondary bg-subtle px-1 inline! py-0 wrap-break-word" data-text="true">idle</code>. The promise resolves
with response metadata and body for completed HTTP responses, including non-2xx status codes.
It is rejected when the file cannot be read, the request fails, or the task is cancelled.</p>
<p class="text-inherit font-normal text-[14px] leading-[1.5715] tracking-[-0.006rem] mb-2.5 [table_&amp;]:last:mb-0" data-text="true">If <code class="text-inherit text-xs leading-[130%] font-normal inline-block rounded-md border border-secondary bg-subtle px-1 inline! py-0 wrap-break-word" data-text="true">options.signal</code> is aborted, the promise is rejected with an <code class="text-inherit text-xs leading-[130%] font-normal inline-block rounded-md border border-secondary bg-subtle px-1 inline! py-0 wrap-break-word" data-text="true">AbortError</code>.</p><div data-md="api-returns" class="flex flex-row items-start gap-2"><div class="flex flex-row items-center gap-2"><svg fill="none" viewBox="0 0 24 24" stroke="currentColor" class="translate-z shrink-0 inline-block rounded-md border border-secondary bg-subtle px-1 py-0.5" data-text="true">union</code></div><div class="px-4 [table_&amp;]:mb-0! [table_&amp;]:px-0"><p class="text-inherit font-normal text-[14px] leading-[1.5715] tracking-[-0.006rem] mb-2.5 [table_&amp;]:last:mb-0" data-text="true">A property that indicates the current byte offset in the file. Calling <code class="text-inherit text-xs leading-[130%] font-normal inline-block rounded-md border border-secondary bg-subtle px-1 inline! py-0 wrap-break-word" data-text="true">readBytes</code> or <code class="text-inherit text-xs leading-[130%] font-normal inline-block rounded-md border border-secondary bg-subtle px-1 inline! py-0 wrap-break-word" data-text="true">writeBytes</code> will read or write a specified amount of bytes starting from this offset. The offset is incremented by the number of bytes read or written.
The offset can be set to any value within the file size. If the offset is set to a value greater than the file size, the next write operation will append data to the end of the file.
Null if the file handle is closed.</p></div><p class="tracking-[-0.006rem] text-sm font-medium text-tertiary mx-4 mb-2.5 [table_&amp;]:last:mb-0" data-text="true">Acceptable values are:<!-- --> <code class="text-inherit text-xs leading-[130%] font-normal inline-block rounded-md border border-secondary bg-subtle px-1 py-0.5 mb-px" data-text="true">number</code><span class="text-quaternary"> | </span><code class="text-inherit text-xs leading-[130%] font-normal inline-block rounded-md border border-secondary bg-subtle px-1 py-0.5 mb-px" data-text="true">null</code></p></div><div class="even:bg-subtle"><td class="border-r border-secondary p-4 text-left last:border-r-0"><span class="leading-[1.6154] text-inherit font-medium" data-text="true">idempotent</span><span class="flex text-xs! text-tertiary">(optional)</span></td><td class="border-r border-secondary p-4 text-left last:border-r-0"><code class="text-inherit text-xs leading-[130%] font-normal inline-block rounded-md border border-secondary bg-subtle px-1 py-0.5 [&amp;&gt;span]:text-inherit!" data-text="true">boolean</code></td><td class="border-r border-secondary p-4 text-left last:border-r-0"><div class="px-4 [table_&amp;]:mb-0! [table_&amp;]:px-0"><p class="text-inherit font-normal text-[14px] leading-[1.5715] tracking-[-0.006rem] mb-2.5 [table_&amp;]:last:mb-0" data-text="true">This flag controls whether the <code class="text-inherit text-xs leading-[130%] font-normal inline-block rounded-md border border-secondary bg-subtle px-1 inline! py-0 wrap-break-word" data-text="true">create</code> operation is idempotent
(safe to call multiple times without error).</p>
<p class="text-inherit font-normal text-[14px] leading-[1.5715] tracking-[-0.006rem] mb-2.5 [table_&amp;]:last:mb-0" data-text="true">If <code class="text-inherit text-xs leading-[130%] font-normal inline-block rounded-md border border-secondary bg-subtle px-1 inline! py-0 wrap-break-word" data-text="true">true</code>, creating a file or directory that already exists will succeed silently.
If <code class="text-inherit text-xs leading-[130%] font-normal inline-block rounded-md border border-secondary bg-subtle px-1 inline! py-0 wrap-break-word" data-text="true">false</code>, an error will be thrown when the target already exists.</p><div class="flex items-start gap-1"><span class="text-sm font-medium text-tertiary">Default:</span><code class="text-inherit text-xs leading-[130%] font-normal inline-block rounded-md border border-secondary bg-subtle px-1 py-0.5 text-[90%]!" data-text="true">false</code></div></div></td></tr><tr class="even:bg-subtle"><td class="border-r border-secondary p-4 text-left last:border-r-0"><span class="leading-[1.6154] text-inherit font-medium" data-text="true">intermediates</span><span class="flex text-xs! text-tertiary">(optional)</span></td><td class="border-r border-secondary p-4 text-left last:border-r-0"><code class="text-inherit text-xs leading-[130%] font-normal inline-block rounded-md border border-secondary bg-subtle px-1 py-0.5 [&amp;&gt;span]:text-inherit!" data-text="true">boolean</code></td><td class="border-r border-secondary p-4 text-left last:border-r-0"><div class="px-4 [table_&amp;]:mb-0! [table_&amp;]:px-0"><p class="text-inherit font-normal text-[14px] leading-[1.5715] tracking-[-0.006rem] mb-2.5 [table_&amp;]:last:mb-0" data-text="true">Whether to create intermediate directories if they do not exist.</p><div class="flex items-start gap-1"><span class="text-sm font-medium text-tertiary">Default:</span><code class="text-inherit text-xs leading-[130%] font-normal inline-block rounded-md border border-secondary bg-subtle px-1 py-0.5 text-[90%]!" data-text="true">false</code></div></div></td></tr><tr class="even:bg-subtle"><td class="border-r border-secondary p-4 text-left last:border-r-0"><span class="leading-[1.6154] text-inherit font-medium" data-text="true">overwrite</span><span class="flex text-xs! text-tertiary">(optional)</span></td><td class="border-r border-secondary p-4 text-left last:border-r-0"><code class="text-inherit text-xs leading-[130%] font-normal inline-block rounded-md border border-secondary bg-subtle px-1 py-0.5 [&amp;&gt;span]:text-inherit!" data-text="true">boolean</code></td><td class="border-r border-secondary p-4 text-left last:border-r-0"><div class="px-4 [table_&amp;]:mb-0! [table_&amp;]:px-0"><p class="text-inherit font-normal text-[14px] leading-[1.5715] tracking-[-0.006rem] mb-2.5 [table_&amp;]:last:mb-0" data-text="true">Whether to overwrite the directory if it exists.</p><div class="flex items-start gap-1"><span class="text-sm font-medium text-tertiary">Default:</span><code class="text-inherit text-xs leading-[130%] font-normal inline-block rounded-md border border-secondary bg-subtle px-1 py-0.5 text-[90%]!" data-text="true">false</code></div></div></td></tr></tbody></table></div></div><div class="mb-5 overflow-hidden rounded-lg border [table_&amp;]:px-0"><p class="text-inherit font-normal text-[14px] leading-[1.5715] tracking-[-0.006rem] mb-2.5 [table_&amp;]:last:mb-0" data-text="true">This flag controls whether the <code class="text-inherit text-xs leading-[130%] font-normal inline-block rounded-md border border-secondary bg-subtle px-1 inline! py-0 wrap-break-word" data-text="true">download</code> operation is idempotent
(safe to call multiple times without error).</p>
<p class="text-inherit font-normal text-[14px] leading-[1.5715] tracking-[-0.006rem] mb-2.5 [table_&amp;]:last:mb-0" data-text="true">If <code class="text-inherit text-xs leading-[130%] font-normal inline-block rounded-md border border-secondary bg-subtle px-1 inline! py-0 wrap-break-word" data-text="true">true</code>, downloading a file that already exists overwrites the previous one.
If <code class="text-inherit text-xs leading-[130%] font-normal inline-block rounded-md border border-secondary bg-subtle px-1 inline! py-0 wrap-break-word" data-text="true">false</code>, an error is thrown when the target file already exists.</p><div class="flex items-start gap-1"><span class="text-sm font-medium text-tertiary">Default:</span><code class="text-inherit text-xs leading-[130%] font-normal inline-block rounded-md border border-secondary bg-subtle px-1 py-0.5 text-[90%]!" data-text="true">false</code></div></div></td></tr><tr class="even:bg-subtle"><td class="border-r border-secondary p-4 text-left last:border-r-0"><span class="leading-[1.6154] text-inherit font-medium" data-text="true">onProgress</span><span class="flex text-xs! text-tertiary">(optional)</span></td><td class="border-r border-secondary p-4 text-left last:border-r-0"><code class="text-inherit text-xs leading-[130%] font-normal inline-block rounded-md border border-secondary bg-subtle px-1 py-0.5 [&amp;&gt;span]:text-inherit!" data-text="true"><span class="text-quaternary">(</span><span>data<span class="text-quaternary">:</span> <a href="#downloadprogress" class="cursor-pointer decoration-0 hocus:opacity-80 font-normal text-link visited:text-link hocus:underline [&amp;_code]:hocus:underline [&amp;_b]:text-link [&amp;_code]:text-link [&amp;_em]:text-link [&amp;_i]:text-link [&amp;_span]:text-link [&amp;_strong]:text-link">DownloadProgress</a></span><span class="text-quaternary">) =&gt;</span> <!-- -->void</code></td><td class="border-r border-secondary p-4 text-left last:border-r-0"><div class="px-4 [table_&amp;]:mb-0! [table_&amp;]:px-0"><p class="text-inherit font-normal text-[14px] leading-[1.5715] tracking-[-0.006rem] mb-2.5 [table_&amp;]:last:mb-0" data-text="true">A callback that is invoked with progress updates during the download.</p></div></td></tr><tr class="even:bg-subtle"><td class="border-r border-secondary p-4 text-left last:border-r-0"><span class="leading-[1.6154] text-inherit font-medium" data-text="true">signal</span><span class="flex text-xs! text-tertiary">(optional)</span></td><td class="border-r border-secondary p-4 text-left last:border-r-0"><code class="text-inherit text-xs leading-[130%] font-normal inline-block rounded-md border border-secondary bg-subtle px-1 py-0.5 [&amp;&gt;span]:text-inherit!" data-text="true"><a href="#abortsignal" class="cursor-pointer decoration-0 hocus:opacity-80 font-normal text-link visited:text-link hocus:underline [&amp;_code]:hocus:underline [&amp;_b]:text-link [&amp;_code]:text-link [&amp;_em]:text-link [&amp;_i]:text-link [&amp;_span]:text-link [&amp;_strong]:text-link">AbortSignal</a></code></td><td class="border-r border-secondary p-4 text-left last:border-r-0"><div class="px-4 [table_&amp;]:mb-0! [table_&amp;]:px-0"><p class="text-inherit font-normal text-[14px] leading-[1.5715] tracking-[-0.006rem] mb-2.5 [table_&amp;]:last:mb-0" data-text="true">An <code class="text-inherit text-xs leading-[130%] font-normal inline-block rounded-md border border-secondary bg-subtle px-1 inline! py-0 wrap-break-word" data-text="true">AbortSignal</code> that can be used to cancel the download.
When the signal is aborted, the download is cancelled and the promise rejects with an <code class="text-inherit text-xs leading-[130%] font-normal inline-block rounded-md border border-secondary bg-subtle px-1 inline! py-0 wrap-break-word" data-text="true">AbortError</code>.</p></div></td></tr></tbody></table></div></div><div class="mb-5 overflow-hidden rounded-lg border border-palette-gray4 1.45727V1.45728Z"></path></g></svg><span class="text-xs! leading-none! font-normal whitespace-nowrap">iOS</span></div><br/></span></div><p class="text-inherit font-normal text-[14px] leading-[1.5715] tracking-[-0.006rem] mb-2.5 [table_&amp;]:last:mb-0" data-text="true">Determines whether the iOS native session should continue in the background.
Android accepts this option for API consistency and ignores it.</p>
<p class="text-inherit font-normal text-[14px] leading-[1.5715] tracking-[-0.006rem] mb-2.5 [table_&amp;]:last:mb-0" data-text="true">When set to <code class="text-inherit text-xs leading-[130%] font-normal inline-block rounded-md border border-secondary bg-subtle px-1 inline! py-0 wrap-break-word" data-text="true">&#x27;background&#x27;</code>, the native transfer may continue after the app is
suspended. However, the JavaScript <code class="text-inherit text-xs leading-[130%] font-normal inline-block rounded-md border border-secondary bg-subtle px-1 inline! py-0 wrap-break-word" data-text="true">DownloadTask</code> instance is not
restored if the app is terminated or relaunched, so its promise, progress
callbacks, and cancellation state are only available while the original JS
runtime is still alive.</p><div class="flex items-start gap-1"><span class="text-sm font-medium text-tertiary">Default:</span><code class="text-inherit text-xs leading-[130%] font-normal inline-block rounded-md border border-secondary bg-subtle px-1 py-0.5 text-[90%]!" data-text="true">&#x27;background&#x27;</code></div></div></td></tr><tr class="even:bg-subtle"><td class="border-r border-secondary p-4 text-left last:border-r-0"><span class="leading-[1.6154] text-inherit font-medium" data-text="true">signal</span><span class="flex text-xs! text-tertiary">(optional)</span></td><td class="border-r border-secondary p-4 text-left last:border-r-0"><code class="text-inherit text-xs leading-[130%] font-normal inline-block rounded-md border border-secondary bg-subtle px-1 py-0.5 [&amp;&gt;span]:text-inherit!" data-text="true"><a href="#abortsignal" class="cursor-pointer decoration-0 hocus:opacity-80 font-normal text-link visited:text-link hocus:underline [&amp;_code]:hocus:underline [&amp;_b]:text-link [&amp;_code]:text-link [&amp;_em]:text-link [&amp;_i]:text-link [&amp;_span]:text-link [&amp;_strong]:text-link">AbortSignal</a></code></td><td class="border-r border-secondary p-4 text-left last:border-r-0"><div class="px-4 [table_&amp;]:mb-0! [table_&amp;]:px-0"><p class="text-inherit font-normal text-[14px] leading-[1.5715] tracking-[-0.006rem] mb-2.5 [table_&amp;]:last:mb-0" data-text="true">AbortSignal to cancel the download.</p></div></td></tr></tbody></table></div></div><div class="mb-5 overflow-hidden rounded-lg border border-palette-gray4 shadow-xs [&amp;_h2]:mt-0 [&amp;_h3]:mt-0 [&amp;_h4]:mt-0 data-text="true"><span class="text-sm font-medium text-tertiary">Literal Type: </span><code class="text-inherit text-xs leading-[130%] font-normal inline-block rounded-md border border-secondary bg-subtle px-1 py-0.5" data-text="true">string</code></p><div class="px-4 [table_&amp;]:mb-0! [table_&amp;]:px-0"><p class="text-inherit font-normal text-[14px] leading-[1.5715] tracking-[-0.006rem] mb-2.5 [table_&amp;]:last:mb-0" data-text="true">Represents the current state of a download task.</p></div><p class="tracking-[-0.006rem] text-sm font-medium text-tertiary mx-4 mb-2.5 [table_&amp;]:last:mb-0" data-text="true">Acceptable values are:<!-- --> <code class="text-inherit text-xs leading-[130%] font-normal inline-block rounded-md border border-secondary bg-subtle px-1 py-0.5 mb-px" data-text="true">&#x27;idle&#x27;</code><span class="text-quaternary"> | </span><code class="text-inherit text-xs leading-[130%] font-normal inline-block rounded-md border border-secondary bg-subtle px-1 py-0.5 mb-px" data-text="true">&#x27;active&#x27;</code><span class="text-quaternary"> | </span><code class="text-inherit text-xs leading-[130%] font-normal inline-block rounded-md border border-secondary bg-subtle px-1 py-0.5 mb-px" data-text="true">&#x27;paused&#x27;</code><span class="text-quaternary"> | </span><code class="text-inherit text-xs leading-[130%] font-normal inline-block rounded-md border border-secondary bg-subtle px-1 py-0.5 mb-px" data-text="true">&#x27;completed&#x27;</code><span class="text-quaternary"> | </span><code class="text-inherit text-xs leading-[130%] font-normal inline-block rounded-md border border-secondary bg-subtle px-1 py-0.5 mb-px" data-text="true">&#x27;cancelled&#x27;</code><span class="text-quaternary"> | </span><code class="text-inherit text-xs leading-[130%] font-normal inline-block rounded-md border border-secondary bg-subtle px-1 py-0.5 mb-px" data-text="true">&#x27;error&#x27;</code></p></div><div class="mb-5 overflow-hidden rounded-lg border border-palette-gray4 This is the same as the <code class="text-inherit text-xs leading-[130%] font-normal inline-block rounded-md border border-secondary bg-subtle px-1 inline! py-0 wrap-break-word" data-text="true">fileUri</code> input parameter
and preserves its scheme (for example, <code class="text-inherit text-xs leading-[130%] font-normal inline-block rounded-md border border-secondary bg-subtle px-1 inline! py-0 wrap-break-word" to be picked. It also supports wildcards like <code class="text-inherit text-xs leading-[130%] font-normal inline-block rounded-md border border-secondary bg-subtle px-1 inline! py-0 wrap-break-word" data-text="true">&#x27;image/*&#x27;</code> to choose any image. To allow any type
of document you can use <code class="text-inherit text-xs leading-[130%] font-normal inline-block rounded-md border border-secondary bg-subtle px-1 inline! py-0 wrap-break-word" data-text="true">&#x27;*/*&#x27;</code>.</p><div class="flex items-start gap-1"><span class="text-sm font-medium text-tertiary">Default:</span><code class="text-inherit text-xs leading-[130%] font-normal inline-block rounded-md border border-secondary bg-subtle px-1 py-0.5 text-[90%]!" data-text="true">&#x27;*/*&#x27;</code></div></div></td></tr><tr class="even:bg-subtle"><td class="border-r border-secondary p-4 text-left last:border-r-0"><span class="leading-[1.6154] text-inherit font-medium" data-text="true">multipleFiles</span><span class="flex text-xs! text-tertiary">(optional)</span></td><td class="border-r border-secondary p-4 text-left last:border-r-0"><code class="text-inherit text-xs leading-[130%] font-normal inline-block rounded-md border border-secondary bg-subtle px-1 py-0.5 [&amp;&gt;span]:text-inherit!" data-text="true">boolean</code></td><td class="border-r border-secondary p-4 text-left last:border-r-0"><div class="px-4 [table_&amp;]:mb-0! [table_&amp;]:px-0"><p class="text-inherit font-normal text-[14px] leading-[1.5715] tracking-[-0.006rem] mb-2.5 [table_&amp;]:last:mb-0" data-text="true">Result type for picking multiple files.</p>
<p class="text-inherit font-normal text-[14px] leading-[1.5715] tracking-[-0.006rem] mb-2.5 [table_&amp;]:last:mb-0" data-text="true">Successful picks return <code class="text-inherit text-xs leading-[130%] font-normal inline-block rounded-md border border-secondary bg-subtle px-1 inline! py-0 wrap-break-word" data-text="true">{ result: File[], canceled: false }</code>. Canceled picks return
<code class="text-inherit text-xs leading-[130%] font-normal inline-block rounded-md border border-secondary bg-subtle px-1 inline! py-0 wrap-break-word" data-text="true">{ result: null, canceled: true }</code>.</p></div><p class="tracking-[-0.006rem] text-sm font-medium text-tertiary mx-4 mb-2.5 [table_&amp;]:last:mb-0" data-text="true">Type:<!-- --> <code class="text-xs leading-[130%] [table_&amp;]:px-0"><p class="text-inherit font-normal text-[14px] leading-[1.5715] tracking-[-0.006rem] mb-2.5 [table_&amp;]:last:mb-0" data-text="true">The MIME type of the file.</p></div></td></tr><tr class="even:bg-subtle"><td class="border-r border-secondary p-4 text-left last:border-r-0"><span class="leading-[1.6154] text-inherit font-medium" data-text="true">onProgress</span><span class="flex text-xs! text-tertiary">(optional)</span></td><td class="border-r border-secondary p-4 text-left last:border-r-0"><code class="text-inherit text-xs leading-[130%] font-normal inline-block rounded-md border border-secondary bg-subtle px-1 py-0.5 [&amp;&gt;span]:text-inherit!" data-text="true"><span class="text-quaternary">(</span><span>data<span class="text-quaternary">:</span> <a href="#uploadprogress" class="cursor-pointer decoration-0 hocus:opacity-80 font-normal text-link visited:text-link hocus:underline [&amp;_code]:hocus:underline [&amp;_b]:text-link [&amp;_code]:text-link [&amp;_em]:text-link [&amp;_i]:text-link [&amp;_span]:text-link [&amp;_strong]:text-link">UploadProgress</a></span><span class="text-quaternary">) =&gt;</span> <!-- -->void</code></td><td class="border-r border-secondary p-4 text-left last:border-r-0"><div class="px-4 [table_&amp;]:mb-0! <blockquote class="flex rounded-md border border-default bg-subtle gap-2 px-3 py-2.5 [&amp;_code]:bg-element [&amp;_p]:mb-0! shadow-none mb-2.5 [table_&amp;]:last:mb-0" data-md="callout"><svg fill="none" viewBox="0 0 24 24" stroke="currentColor" class="translate-z shrink-0 select-none mt-0.75 icon-xs text-icon-default" role="img" aria-hidden="true"><g id="info-circle-duotone-icon"><path id="Fill" fill="currentColor" d="M12 22C17.5228 22 22 17.5228 22 12C22 6.47715 17.5228 2 12 2C6.47715 2 2 6.47715 2 12C2 17.5228 6.47715 22 12 22Z" opacity="0.12"></path><path id="Icon" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" stroke-width="2" d="M12 16V12M12 8H12.01M22 12C22 17.5228 17.5228 22 12 22C6.47715 22 2 17.5228 2 12C2 6.47715 6.47715 2 12 2C17.5228 2 22 6.47715 22 12Z"></path></g></svg><div class="w-full text-default last:mb-0 text-sm [&amp;_code]:text-[90%] [&amp;_p]:text-sm">
<p class="text-inherit font-normal text-[14px] leading-[1.5715] tracking-[-0.006rem] mb-2.5 [table_&amp;]:last:mb-0" data-text="true"><span class="leading-[1.6154] text-inherit font-semibold" data-text="true">Note:</span> For multipart uploads, the reported bytes may include multipart framing overhead
(boundary strings, headers, form parameters) in addition to the file content.</p>

tracking-[-0.006rem] mb-2.5 [table_&amp;]:last:mb-0" data-text="true">Determines whether the iOS native session should continue in the background.</p>
<p class="text-inherit font-normal text-[14px] leading-[1.5715] tracking-[-0.006rem] mb-2.5 [table_&amp;]:last:mb-0" data-text="true">When set to <code class="text-inherit text-xs leading-[130%] font-normal inline-block rounded-md border border-secondary bg-subtle px-1 inline! py-0 wrap-break-word" data-text="true">&#x27;background&#x27;</code>, the native transfer may continue after the app is
suspended. However, the JavaScript <code class="text-inherit text-xs leading-[130%] font-normal inline-block rounded-md border border-secondary bg-subtle px-1 inline! py-0 wrap-break-word" data-text="true">UploadTask</code> instance is not
restored if the app is terminated or relaunched, so its promise, progress
callbacks, and cancellation state are only available while the original JS
runtime is still alive.</p><div class="flex items-start gap-1"><span class="text-sm font-medium text-tertiary">Default:</span><code class="text-inherit text-xs leading-[130%] font-normal inline-block rounded-md border border-secondary bg-subtle px-1 py-0.5 text-[90%]!" data-text="true">&#x27;background&#x27;</code></div></div></td></tr><tr class="even:bg-subtle"><td class="border-r border-secondary p-4 text-left last:border-r-0"><span class="leading-[1.6154] text-inherit font-medium" data-text="true">signal</span><span class="flex text-xs! text-tertiary">(optional)</span></td><td class="border-r border-secondary p-4 text-left last:border-r-0"><code class="text-inherit text-xs leading-[130%] font-normal inline-block rounded-md border border-secondary bg-subtle px-1 py-0.5 [&amp;&gt;span]:text-inherit!" data-text="true"><a href="#abortsignal" class="cursor-pointer decoration-0 hocus:opacity-80 font-normal text-link visited:text-link hocus:underline [&amp;_code]:hocus:underline [&amp;_b]:text-link [&amp;_code]:text-link [&amp;_em]:text-link [&amp;_i]:text-link [&amp;_span]:text-link [&amp;_strong]:text-link">AbortSignal</a></code></td><td class="border-r border-secondary p-4 text-left last:border-r-0"><div class="px-4 [table_&amp;]:mb-0! [table_&amp;]:px-0"><p class="text-inherit font-normal text-[14px] leading-[1.5715] tracking-[-0.006rem] mb-2.5 [table_&amp;]:last:mb-0" data-text="true">An <code class="text-inherit text-xs leading-[130%] font-normal inline-block rounded-md border border-secondary bg-subtle px-1 inline! py-0 wrap-break-word" data-text="true">AbortSignal</code> that can be used to cancel the upload.
When the signal is aborted, the upload is cancelled and the promise rejects with an <code class="text-inherit text-xs leading-[130%] font-normal inline-block rounded-md border border-secondary bg-subtle px-1 inline! py-0 wrap-break-word" data-text="true">AbortError</code>.</p></div></td></tr><tr class="even:bg-subtle"><td class="border-r border-secondary p-4 text-left last:border-r-0"><span class="leading-[1.6154] text-inherit font-medium" data-text="true">uploadType</span><span class="flex text-xs! text-tertiary">(optional)</span></td><td class="border-r border-secondary p-4 text-left last:border-r-0"><code class="text-inherit text-xs leading-[130%] font-normal inline-block rounded-md border border-secondary bg-subtle px-1 py-0.5 [&amp;&gt;span]:text-inherit!" data-text="true"><a href="#uploadtype" class="cursor-pointer decoration-0 hocus:opacity-80 font-normal text-link visited:text-link hocus:underline [&amp;_code]:hocus:underline [&amp;_b]:text-link [&amp;_code]:text-link [&amp;_em]:text-link [&amp;_i]:text-link [&amp;_span]:text-link [&amp;_strong]:text-link">UploadType</a></code></td><td class="border-r border-secondary p-4 text-left last:border-r-0"><div class="px-4 [table_&amp;]:mb-0! [table_&amp;]:px-0"><p class="text-inherit font-normal text-[14px] leading-[1.5715] tracking-[-0.006rem] mb-2.5 [table_&amp;]:last:mb-0" data-text="true">The type of upload operation.</p><div class="flex items-start gap-1"><span class="text-sm font-medium text-tertiary">Default:</span><code class="text-inherit text-xs leading-[130%] font-normal inline-block rounded-md border border-secondary bg-subtle px-1 py-0.5 text-[90%]!" data-text="true">UploadType.BINARY_CONTENT</code></div></div></td></tr></tbody></table></div></div><div class="mb-5 overflow-hidden rounded-lg bg-subtle px-1 py-0.5" data-text="true">string</code></p><div class="px-4 [table_&amp;]:mb-0! [table_&amp;]:px-0"><p class="text-inherit font-normal text-[14px] leading-[1.5715] tracking-[-0.006rem] mb-2.5 [table_&amp;]:last:mb-0" data-text="true">The type of change that triggered a watcher event.</p>
<ul class="leading-[1.6154] text-inherit list-disc ml-6 [&amp;_ol]:mt-2 [&amp;_ol]:mb-4 [&amp;_ul]:mt-2 [&amp;_ul]:mb-4 mb-2.5 [table_&amp;]:last:mb-0">
<li class="text-inherit font-normal mb-2 text-sm" data-text="true"><code class="text-inherit text-xs leading-[130%] font-normal inline-block rounded-md border border-secondary bg-subtle px-1 inline! py-0 wrap-break-word" data-text="true">created</code> — a new file or directory was created</li>
<li class="text-inherit font-normal mb-2 text-sm" data-text="true"><code class="text-inherit text-xs leading-[130%] font-normal inline-block rounded-md border border-secondary bg-subtle px-1 inline! py-0 wrap-break-word" data-text="true">modified</code> — the file contents or metadata changed</li>
<li class="text-inherit font-normal mb-2 text-sm" data-text="true"><code class="text-inherit text-xs leading-[130%] font-normal inline-block rounded-md border border-secondary bg-subtle px-1 inline! py-0 wrap-break-word" data-text="true">deleted</code> — the file or directory was removed</li>
<li class="text-inherit font-normal mb-2 text-sm" data-text="true"><code class="text-inherit text-xs leading-[130%] font-normal inline-block rounded-md border border-secondary bg-subtle px-1 inline! py-0 wrap-break-word" data-text="true">renamed</code> — the file or directory was renamed or moved</li>
</ul></div><p class="tracking-[-0.006rem] text-sm font-medium text-tertiary mx-4 mb-2.5 [table_&amp;]:last:mb-0" data-text="true">Acceptable values are:<!-- --> <code class="text-inherit text-xs class="text-inherit text-xs leading-[130%] font-normal inline-block rounded-md border border-secondary bg-subtle px-1 py-0.5 mb-px" data-text="true">&#x27;modified&#x27;</code><span class="text-quaternary"> | </span><code class="text-inherit text-xs leading-[130%] font-normal inline-block rounded-md border border-secondary bg-subtle px-1 py-0.5 mb-px" data-text="true">&#x27;deleted&#x27;</code><span class="text-quaternary"> | </span><code class="text-inherit text-xs leading-[130%] font-normal inline-block rounded-md border border-secondary bg-subtle px-1 py-0.5 mb-px" data-text="true">&#x27;renamed&#x27;</code></p></div><div class="mb-5 overflow-hidden rounded-lg border border-palette-gray4 shadow-xs [&amp;_h2]:mt-0 [&amp;_h3]:mt-0 [table_&amp;]:px-0"><p class="text-inherit font-normal text-[14px] leading-[1.5715] tracking-[-0.006rem] mb-2.5 [table_&amp;]:last:mb-0" data-text="true">Options for configuring a file system watcher.</p></div><div class=""></div><div class="table-wrapper mb-4 overflow-x-auto overflow-y-hidden border-default shadow-xs mt-0.5 rounded-none border-0 border-t"><table class="w-full rounded-none border-0 text-sm text-default [&amp;_p]:text-sm [&amp;_li]:text-sm [&amp;_span]:text-sm [&amp;_code_span]:text-xs [&amp;_strong]:text-sm [&amp;_blockquote_div]:text-sm [&amp;_blockquote_code]:px-1 [&amp;_blockquote_code]:py-0"><thead class="border-b border-b-default bg-subtle"><tr class="even:bg-subtle"><th class="border-r border-secondary px-4 font-medium text-secondary text-left py-2 text-xs [&amp;_code]:text-xs [&amp;_code]:text-secondary last:border-r-0">Property</th><th class="border-r border-secondary px-4 font-medium text-secondary text-left py-2 text-xs [&amp;_code]:text-xs [&amp;_code]:text-secondary last:border-r-0">Type</th><th class="border-r border-secondary px-4 font-medium text-secondary text-left py-2 text-xs [&amp;_code]:text-xs [&amp;_code]:text-secondary last:border-r-0">Description</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr class="even:bg-subtle"><td class="border-r border-secondary p-4 text-left last:border-r-0"><span class="leading-[1.6154] text-inherit font-medium" data-text="true">debounce</span><span class="flex text-xs! text-tertiary">(optional)</span></td><td class="border-r border-secondary p-4 text-left last:border-r-0"><code class="text-inherit text-xs leading-[130%] font-normal inline-block rounded-md border border-secondary bg-subtle px-1 py-0.5 [&amp;&gt;span]:text-inherit!" data-text="true">number</code></td><td class="border-r border-secondary p-4 text-left last:border-r-0"><div class="px-4 [table_&amp;]:mb-0! [table_&amp;]:px-0"><p class="text-inherit font-normal text-[14px] leading-[1.5715] tracking-[-0.006rem] mb-2.5 [table_&amp;]:last:mb-0" data-text="true">The debounce interval in milliseconds for coalescing rapid successive events into a single callback.</p><div class="flex items-start gap-1"><span class="text-sm font-medium text-tertiary">Default:</span><code class="text-inherit text-xs leading-[130%] font-normal inline-block rounded-md border border-secondary bg-subtle px-1 py-0.5 text-[90%]!" data-text="true">100</code></div></div></td></tr><tr class="even:bg-subtle"><td class="border-r border-secondary p-4 text-left last:border-r-0"><span class="leading-[1.6154] text-inherit font-medium" data-text="true">events</span><span class="flex text-xs! text-tertiary">(optional)</span></td><td class="border-r border-secondary p-4 text-left last:border-r-0"><code class="text-inherit text-xs leading-[130%] font-normal inline-block rounded-md border border-secondary bg-subtle px-1 py-0.5 [&amp;&gt;span]:text-inherit!" data-text="true"><a href="#watcheventtype" class="cursor-pointer decoration-0 hocus:opacity-80 font-normal text-link visited:text-link hocus:underline [&amp;_code]:hocus:underline [&amp;_b]:text-link [&amp;_code]:text-link [&amp;_em]:text-link [&amp;_i]:text-link [&amp;_span]:text-link [&amp;_strong]:text-link">WatchEventType<!-- -->[]</a></code></td><td class="border-r border-secondary p-4 text-left last:border-r-0"><div class="px-4 [table_&amp;]:mb-0! [table_&amp;]:px-0"><p class="text-inherit font-normal text-[14px] leading-[1.5715] tracking-[-0.006rem] mb-2.5 [table_&amp;]:last:mb-0" data-text="true">Limits which event types trigger the callback. If omitted, all event types are observed.</p>
<p class="text-inherit font-normal text-[14px] leading-[1.5715] tracking-[-0.006rem] mb-2.5 [table_&amp;]:last:mb-0" data-text="true">On iOS, directory watchers only provide coarse-grained notifications that the directory itself
changed, so filtering for child-level <code class="text-inherit text-xs leading-[130%] font-normal inline-block rounded-md border border-secondary bg-subtle px-1 inline! py-0 wrap-break-word" data-text="true">created</code>, <code class="text-inherit text-xs leading-[130%] font-normal inline-block rounded-md border border-secondary bg-subtle px-1 inline! py-0 wrap-break-word" data-text="true">deleted</code>, or <code class="text-inherit text-xs leading-[130%] font-normal inline-block rounded-md border border-secondary bg-subtle px-1 inline! py-0 wrap-break-word" data-text="true">renamed</code> events is not reliable.</p></div></td></tr></tbody></table></div></div><div class="mb-5 overflow-hidden rounded-lg border border-palette-gray4 shadow-xs [&amp;_h2]:mt-0 [&amp;_h3]:mt-0 [&amp;_h4]:mt-0 [&amp;_h3]:mb-1.5 [&amp;_h4]:mb-0 [&amp;_li]:mb-0 [&amp;_thead]:border-palette-gray4 [&amp;_th]:px-4 [&amp;_th]:text-tertiary [&amp;_td]:border-palette-gray4 Call <code class="text-inherit text-xs leading-[130%] font-normal inline-block rounded-md border border-secondary bg-subtle px-1 inline! py-0 wrap-break-word" data-text="true">remove()</code> to stop watching and release resources.</p></div><div class=""></div><div class="table-wrapper mb-4 overflow-x-auto overflow-y-hidden border-default shadow-xs mt-0.5 rounded-none border-0 border-t"><table class="w-full rounded-none border-0 text-sm text-default [&amp;_p]:text-sm [&amp;_li]:text-sm [&amp;_span]:text-sm [&amp;_code_span]:text-xs [&amp;_strong]:text-sm [&amp;_blockquote_div]:text-sm [&amp;_blockquote_code]:px-1 [&amp;_blockquote_code]:py-0"><thead class="border-b border-b-default bg-subtle"><tr class="even:bg-subtle"><th class="border-r border-secondary px-4 font-medium text-secondary text-left py-2 text-xs [&amp;_code]:text-xs [&amp;_code]:text-secondary last:border-r-0">Property</th><th class="border-r border-secondary px-4 font-medium text-secondary text-left py-2 text-xs [&amp;_code]:text-xs [&amp;_code]:text-secondary last:border-r-0">Type</th><th class="border-r border-secondary px-4 font-medium text-secondary text-left py-2 text-xs [&amp;_code]:text-xs [&amp;_code]:text-secondary last:border-r-0">Description</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr class="even:bg-subtle"><td class="border-r border-secondary p-4 text-left last:border-r-0"><span class="leading-[1.6154] text-inherit font-medium" data-text="true">remove</span></td><td class="border-r border-secondary p-4 text-left last:border-r-0"><code class="text-inherit text-xs leading-[130%] font-normal inline-block rounded-md border border-secondary bg-subtle px-1 py-0.5" data-text="true" data-md="type-sig"><span class="text-quaternary">(</span><span class="text-quaternary">) =&gt;</span> <!-- -->void</code></td><td class="border-r border-secondary p-4 text-left last:border-r-0"><div class="px-4 [table_&amp;]:mb-0! The cursor is positioned at the beginning of the file.</p></div></div><div class="border-t border-t-palette-gray4 px-4 pt-3 pb-0 [&amp;_h4]:mb-0.5"><div class="flex flex-wrap justify-between max-md:flex-col"><h4 class="text-inherit text-[16px] leading-relaxed font-semibold tracking-[-0.011rem] mt-6 mb-2 [&amp;_code]:text-[90%] group flex gap-1 scroll-m-5" data-heading="true" id="readwrite"><code class="leading-[1.6154] text-inherit text-sm! font-medium! wrap-anywhere!" data-text="true">ReadWrite</code><a href="#readwrite" class="border border-solid rounded-full font-medium items-center whitespace-nowrap gap-2 text-sm border-button-quaternary bg-button-quaternary text-button-quaternary shadow-none hocus:bg-button-quaternary-hover active:scale-98 relative my-auto inline-flex justify-center p-0 transition-all duration-default invisible opacity-0 group-hover:visible group-hover:opacity-100 group-focus-visible:visible group-focus-visible:opacity-100 size-5.5 min-w-5.5 font-medium!"><span class="flex self-center text-inherit leading-none select-none"><svg aria-label="permalink" class="shrink-0 icon-xs" width="24" height="24" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><path d="M10 13a5 5 0 007.54.54l3-3a5 5 0 00-7.07-7.07l-1.72 1.71" stroke="#9B9B9B" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"></path><path d="M14 11a5 5 0 00-7.54-.54l-3 3a5 5 0 007.07 7.07l1.71-1.71" stroke="#9B9B9B" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"></path></svg></span></a></h4></div><code class="mb-2 inline-flex text-xs wrap-anywhere text-tertiary" data-text="true">FileMode.ReadWrite ＝ &quot;rw&quot;</code><div class=""><p class="text-inherit font-normal text-[14px] leading-[1.5715] tracking-[-0.006rem] mb-2.5 [table_&amp;]:last:mb-0" data-text="true">Opens the file for both reading and writing.
The cursor is positioned at the beginning of the file.</p>
<blockquote class="flex rounded-md border border-default bg-subtle gap-2 px-3 py-2.5 [&amp;_code]:bg-element [&amp;_p]:mb-0! shadow-none mb-2.5 [table_&amp;]:last:mb-0" data-md="callout"><svg fill="none" viewBox="0 0 24 24" stroke="currentColor" class="translate-z shrink-0 select-none mt-0.75 icon-xs text-icon-default" role="img" aria-hidden="true"><g id="info-circle-duotone-icon"><path id="Fill" fill="currentColor" d="M12 22C17.5228 22 22 17.5228 22 12C22 6.47715 17.5228 2 12 2C6.47715 2 2 6.47715 2 12C2 17.5228 6.47715 22 12 22Z" opacity="0.12"></path><path id="Icon" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" stroke-width="2" d="M12 16V12M12 8H12.01M22 12C22 17.5228 17.5228 22 12 22C6.47715 22 2 17.5228 2 12C2 6.47715 6.47715 2 12 2C17.5228 2 22 6.47715 22 12Z"></path></g></svg><div class="w-full text-default last:mb-0 text-sm [&amp;_code]:text-[90%] [&amp;_p]:text-sm">
<p class="text-inherit font-normal text-[14px] leading-[1.5715] tracking-[-0.006rem] mb-2.5 [table_&amp;]:last:mb-0" data-text="true"><span class="leading-[1.6154] text-inherit font-semibold" data-text="true">Note</span>: This mode cannot be used with SAF (Storage Access Framework) <code class="text-inherit text-xs leading-[130%] font-normal inline-block rounded-md border border-secondary bg-subtle px-1 inline! py-0 wrap-break-word" data-text="true">content://</code> URIs.</p>
